programme.title: Forensic Files: Sign of the Crime
programme.desc: Fire rips through a Seattle woman's apartment and some unsettling evidence is found in the rubble. Shortly after, a second fire breaks out just 100 feet from the first, and evidence points to a serial killer whose skills are evolving.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Covet Thy Neighbor
programme.desc: Olamide Elizabeth Adeyooye, a science major has been missing for 48 hrs, and her family grows increasingly concerned.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Writing on the Wall
programme.desc: A gorgeous flight attendant is brutally murdered in her own home and the laundry list of suspects is growing by the minute. A striking clue at the scene leads investigators in the wrong direction, but will forensic evidence get them back on track?

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hundreds of Reasons
programme.desc: A well-liked assistant manager of a Florida steakhouse in murdered while he closes his restaurant for the night.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cold Feet
programme.desc: A woman is abducted from her late-night job at a Florida convenience store. After she is found raped and strangled, investigators know the only way to pin down her killer will be through DNA analysis.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Separation Anxiety
programme.desc: 'The Tracey Frame Case' - after a passer-by spots a wild fire in a secluded parking lot, police discover a dreadful homicide. It takes days to identify the victim, and most of the evidence is lost when firefighters extinguish the blaze.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Office Visit
programme.desc: "The Dr. Brian Stidham Case" A prominent Arizona surgeon is found stabbed to death outside his office. All signs point to a random attack until investigators uncover an unlikely suspect with deep pockets, and an even deeper hatred for the good doctor.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shoe-In for Murder
programme.desc: A 12 year-old is the only witness to her mother's death and is unable to provide many details. Over a decade later, forensic evidence has lead the investigation right back to where it started.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Family Interrupted
programme.desc: A family interrupts a burglary in their upscale suburban home. The masked gunman kills two and wounds two more. Police suspect the crime is related to a string of thefts in the area, but a closer look at the crime scene reveals the real motive and killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Palm Saturday
programme.desc: 'The Brian and Beverly Mauck Case - an attractive young couple is found dead in their Graham, Washington home and all signs point to a professional hit. But dogged investigators discover some valuable evidence that proves otherwise.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Runaway Love
programme.desc: A woman is found floating in the harbor of an upscale yacht club, stabbed more than 50 times, and her ex-husband and daughter are missing. Investigators turn to forensic science to determine if they’re searching for victims... or perpetrators.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Watchful Eye
programme.desc: 'The Carrie Nelson Case' - The brutal murder of a State Park employee rattles tourists and fellow employees alike. Murdered for just $2,000, police sift through several hundred leads to find a killer so merciless.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Waste Mis-Management
programme.desc: A middle-aged woman vanishes from her apartment complex. When the police find few leads at the scene of the crime, they realize a nearby dumpster may hold the key to all the answers.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Lights Out
programme.desc: 'The Kathy Odom Case - cold-case detectives in Harris County, TX are stumped by the murder of a young housewife. For over a decade, leads were exhausted and suspects ruled out. But a new lead has changed everything, thanks to forensic science.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pet Rock
programme.desc: 'The Denise O'Neill Case' - a quiet waitress vanishes without a trace. Police suspect a case of a date gone horribly wrong. However, when her body is discovered, it comes wrapped in a mountain of evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Best Foot Forward
programme.desc: A young woman goes missing, but will anyone notice? A business tycoon caught in a scandal he works over-time not to expose.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Purebread Murder
programme.desc: A young mother is murdered after years of domestic abuse. There are clues at the scene: bloody footprints and DNA from the victim's rape kit. But the evidence which will conclusively tie the killer to the crime is on a freshly baked hamburger bun.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hear No Evil
programme.desc: Threatening emails, a missing person and an abandoned truck lead police to a home where they believe a murder was committed. The evidence is overwhelming and investigators are sure they have the killer. What they don't have is the body of the victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: The Kristine Fitzhugh Case - A woman is found dead in her home and it seems like an accidental fall down the stairs is to blame. When a pathologist discovers the death was no accident, police suspect it may have been a burglary gone wrong.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Three's a Crowd
programme.desc: As she left choir practice, the woman was gunned down in the church parking lot. Her husband became the prime suspect, particularly when police learned he found out just a month earlier that his wife had been cheating on him for three years.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Squire's Riches
programme.desc: A man perishes in a fire while working inside his garage. Initially, the coroner rules the death an accident. But a Forensic Odontologist changes the direction of the case, as police unravel a bizarre case of stolen identity.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Home of the Brave
programme.desc: When their trailer catches fire, the young husband heroically rescues his wife and infant son. A month later, his wife is beaten to death in a bedroom of his parents' home. The cut window screen points to an intruder, but there is a lack of evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Freeze Framed
programme.desc: An apparent suicide turns out to be a much more menacing scenario involving a black widow.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Touch of Evil
programme.desc: A dismembered body is dumped on the side of the New Jersey Turnpike and before police realize it, bodies are turning up between two states. A serial killer emerges, targeting Manhattan's gay community.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Textbook Murder
programme.desc: A woman is brutally murdered and police point to her fiancé when they learn that he was having affairs with other women. It is not until a man comes forward with information that he is no longer a suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Filtered Out
programme.desc: When a teenage girl goes missing, no one knows if she ran away or if she was the victim of foul play. Everyone's worst fears are confirmed when a body is found at the bottom of an isolated ravine.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Water Logged
programme.desc: An Ohio woman and her two daughters go missing while vacationing in Florida and their bodies are found floating in Tampa Bay. Five years later, investigators track down the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Social Circle
programme.desc: Four young adults are brutally murdered in an affluent Texas neighbourhood, and the crime scene yields little evidence. The next door neighbours see two people in black walking nearby and their descriptions become a key element in solving the case.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Profiles of intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world are examined.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fate Date
programme.desc: When a couple is found dead inside their home, police question if a third victim found outside was just a good Samaritan or involved in the crime. E-mail tracking leads police to the world of internet dating and to the den of a killer.

programme.title: HLN Weekend Express
programme.desc: News of the day mixed with lifestyle segments, plus weather, sports and enlightening guests.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Gone Ballistic
programme.desc: When a middle-aged man is gunned down in his own home, the motive appears to be robbery, but a mysterious greeting card blows the investigation wide open.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Seeing Red
programme.desc: A high school student vanishes without a trace. False leads force detectives to work double time until a prostitute's murder demands police attention and the possibility arises that the same killer may have struck twice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Skeleton Key
programme.desc: Police think an abusive ex-boyfriend is to blame for a young woman's disappearance, but a set of keys discovered in her vehicle don't match up with either the ex-boyfriend or the victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Funeral Services
programme.desc: A son calls 9-1-1 after finding his father dead in their home. When investigators arrive, an unknown male suspect is inside, but ballistic evidence points to someone else.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Expert Witness

programme.desc: Tormented by hostile crocodiles, territorial howler monkeys and no tree canopy to protect them from the sun in this post-hurricane Nicaraguan jungle, one survivalist suffers third-degree sunburn while the other's life is threatened by a mystery illness.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Feel the Burn
programme.desc: Dropped into Guyana's scorching savannah, two Naked and Afraid superfans battle the oppressive heat and relentless insect attacks. Scorching temperatures lead to severe dehydration and force a desperate fan to risk illness by drinking unsanitary fluids.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Stomping Grounds

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Double Jeopardy

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Love at First Fight
programme.desc: Instant attraction gives way to unforgiving conditions on a Nicaraguan island teeming with bull sharks and big cats. As the struggle to survive hits a low point; a brutal flood threatens to wipe out the camp and all chances of survival.

programme.desc: Each year, dozens of US craft distilleries fail, and Tim Smith knows why. In this episode, Tim and his team of experts help struggling owners of Missouri Ridge Distillery 'put the woods back in the whiskey,' in hopes of turning it from problem to profit.

programme.title: Hoarders: Jim/ Susan
programme.desc: Jim and his wife will be homeless and the grandchildren that he has custody of will become wards of the state if he doesn't clean his home. Susan's daughter is threatening to call Protective Services if her mom doesn't clean up.

programme.title: Hoarders: Phyllis/ Janet
programme.desc: Phyllis' house is packed with a floor to ceiling collection of bags stuffed with dolls. Janet has to crawl over mountains of garbage to get to the one recliner where she eats and sleeps.

programme.title: Hoarders: Randy/ Vicki
programme.desc: Randy's boardwalk memorabilia collection fills a 20,000 square foot building and numerous tractor trailers. Vicki's hoarding is breaking up her family.

programme.title: Hoarders: Lisa/ Bertha
programme.desc: Lisa is an active chef, a member of various cooking groups, and a compulsive food hoarder. Bertha picks through trash on her paper route searching for treasures to take home.

programme.title: Hoarders: Mike/ Bonnie
programme.desc: Mike's house is so toxic that a virus she contracted in the home caused her kidneys to fail, nearly killing her. Bonnie's home is hoarded and in need of repair.

programme.title: Hoarders: Ben and Robin and Kevin
programme.desc: Ailing couple, Ben and Robins's hoarding is so severe that EMT's can no longer access their home for emergencies. Kevin is hiding a hoard of sexual paraphernalia in his home from his family by living in a hotel.

programme.title: Live PD Presents: PD Cam
programme.desc: Deputies in Florida track a suspect with the help of heli-cam and a K9 unit; officers find a young toddler barely alive in a car wreck; and a Texas man resists arrest.

programme.title: Live PD Presents: PD Cam
programme.desc: A Las Vegas officer has a gun fight through a windshield, an escaped convict is caught stealing, and a kidnapped woman is rescued.

programme.title: Live PD Presents: PD Cam

programme.desc: Michael feeds a cannibalistic plant at a garden center, and at the tuxedo store, he sells a tie that literally suits itself. Plus, at a hockey rink, Michael's assistant is speechless with a trick so electric it melts the ice.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Home Run Away
programme.desc: At a deli, Michael bakes bread with power tools, and in a tux store, his outfit change doesn't suit his customer. Plus, at the stadium for the Chicago White Sox, Michael swings for the fences with a fiery trick that stuns his helper.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Moving Dragon
programme.desc: While working at a pool store, Michael flies on a kickboard. Then, at a pet store, he breeds hamsters from pellets. He also stuns his helper on moving day with a fiery statue.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Cat Lady
programme.desc: At auditions, Michael wows directors with costume changes but cracks when he sings. Plus, things get sticky when he demos flying post-its. Then, Michael's co-worker's jaw drops when a shape-shifting tenant returns while they clean house.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Crickets
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Q and Joe head to Joey Fatone's hot dog joint to dish up weenies, and tonight's big loser performs a stand-up comedy routine but barely gets out alive.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Q-Pay
programme.desc: The guys kill time in a waiting room by sharing some TMI texts with strangers, then try to sabotage each other as the wingmen from hell at a dating event. Tonight's big loser gets a very special donation from one of the other Jokers.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Silence of the Lame
programme.desc: It's all play and no work when the guys square off in a toy-pitching competition. And tonight's big loser has to quiet down patrons in a food court.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Walking Dread
programme.desc: The guys take time to smell the roses, then pair up to double dip at the mall. Tonight's loser battles an undead enemy to save his family.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Celebrating 200 Episodes: The First Hundred
programme.desc: Joe, Murr, Q, and Sal reminisce about the first hundred episodes of Impractical Jokers. They discuss the very beginning of the show, everything that's changed over the years, and their time on the road.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Celebrating 200 Episodes: The Second Hundred
programme.desc: Joe, Murr, Q, and Sal reminisce about the past hundred episodes of Impractical Jokers. They discuss pulling off long cons, their favorite punishments, and examine how much they've all aged since season one.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hollywood
programme.desc: The guys fly to LA to try directing before meeting up with Jay and Silent Bob to 'pants' the town red. Later, they throw a huge Hollywood party. Tonight's loser learns the hard way that he's in the band.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Washed Up
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr rat each other out at a pizza place and get into textual relationships with strangers at the mall. Then, the big loser twerks hard for the money at an impromptu bikini car wash.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Chick Magnet
programme.desc: The guys turn on the charm to make a restaurant basement sound enticing and recruit unsuspecting shoppers to shout out bizarre nicknames. Then, tonight's big loser must find his way out of the cuckoo's nest before the chicks get crazy.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hump Day
programme.desc: The guys geek out while lending a hand to customers at a casual restaurant, then battle across the table of a focus group. Plus, tonight's big loser gets spitting mad when forced to spend some quality time at the zoo.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Out of Fashion
programme.desc: Find out what challenge needed to be cancelled and rescheduled three times, and why some people didn't want to be included in the show. Plus, learn what questions the guys prepared that didn't make the cut.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Stripteased
programme.desc: Find out what prop Q asked to keep from the dental damn challenge, what glazed delight is known to give Joe great power and how a doctor's appointment inspired Murr's striptease punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Lords of the Ring
programme.desc: Find out which joker always brings a bag of dental hygiene products to set, why Q changed into cargo pants in a store window and where the art department found the turquoise ring.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Pulling the Rug
programme.desc: Find out where Joe originally wanted to play hide n' seek, what Q's favourite dessert is, and what the crew was most afraid of during Murr's wig-pulling punishment.

programme.desc: A working class woman finds her circumstances greatly improved after marrying a wealthy contractor. After learning of his abusive tendencies, she goes on the run and trains herself to fight back.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: One in 8,000
programme.desc: Leslie and Ben run a charity auction to raise funds for the unity concert. April steps in to manage Andy's schedule, while Donna asks Ron for help with her ex-boyfriend.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Moving Up
programme.desc: Leslie, Ben and Andy head to San Francisco for a National Parks conference. Tom opens his restaurant, and Ron has another run in with his ex-wife, Tammy 2. Leslie makes a huge decision about her future.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Moving Up
programme.desc: Leslie, Ben and Andy head to San Francisco for a National Parks conference. Tom opens his restaurant, and Ron has another run in with his ex-wife, Tammy 2. Leslie makes a huge decision about her future.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: 2017
programme.desc: Leslie launches a competition with tech company Gryzzl for a large parcel of land, which she wants to turn into a National Park. April and Andy try to regain their spontaneity.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Ron and Jammy
programme.desc: Leslie and Ron briefly put aside their feud to help old foe Jeremy Jamm escape the clutches of the diabolical Tammy 2. Ben vows to help April discover her true passion in life, while Andy and Tom travel to Chicago.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: William Henry Harrison
programme.desc: Leslie’s team tries to strengthen her case that the Newport land should be turned into a National Park. Ron’s team, fighting back, brings on a celebrity as a minority owner.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Leslie and Ron
programme.desc: Leslie and Ron attempt to work out their differences.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Gryzzlbox

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Save JJ's
programme.desc: Leslie holds a rally in an attempt to keep JJ's Diner from closing. Tom surprises Donna with the ultimate pre-wedding gift.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Donna and Joe
programme.desc: Donna and Joe tie the knot, while April attempts to keep the wedding running smoothly. Ron creates an awkward situation between Tom and Lucy.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Ms. Ludgate-Dwyer Goes to Washington
programme.desc: While Leslie and April take a business trip to Washington, April wrestles with her future. Back in Pawnee, Andy tries to find April the perfect job.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Pie-Mary
programme.desc: Leslie and Ben come under fire for participating in an old Pawnee tradition. April and Ron go on a scavenger hunt. Donna and Garry stroll down memory lane.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: The Johnny Karate Super Awesome Musical Explosion Show
programme.desc: On the last episode of Andy’s TV show, his friends wish him luck with whatever comes next.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Two Funerals
programme.desc: Ben and April conduct a series of interviews, while Andy and Donna help Ron adjust to a life change.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: One Last Ride

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: One Last Ride

programme.title: Movie: Harry Potter and the Prisoner of Azkaban
programme.desc: Harry learns that a murderer has escaped Azkaban prison and is believed to be after him.

programme.title: Movie: Harry Potter and the Goblet of Fire

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible: Revisited: An Entire Life's Savings
programme.desc: Robert Irvine travels to Murphys, California, to check up on a breakfast-and-lunch diner Hillbillies Restaurant. On his last visit, Robert found a tacky, messy restaurant, a defiant and lazy staff and owner Jamie at her wits' end.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible: Beloved Restaurant on the Rocks
programme.desc: Robert Irvine visits Ferguson, Mo., to help a beloved community restaurant on the brink of closing its doors. The owners of Drake's Place, Sonny and Bridget, are out of both money and options.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Tri-Continent Cuisine
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's checking out killer cuisine spanning three different continents. In Denver, a unique quick service spot dishes out a creative take on Indian curry. Then in northwest Denver, a Brazilian bistro cooks up the bomb croquettes.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Biscuits to Brisket
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's digging in to stick-to-your-ribs comfort food. In Atlanta, the down-home joint cooking up righteous chicken and biscuits and house-cured lox.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: East-West Flavorfest
programme.desc: Washington D.C. serves dumplings and ramen. Atlantic City has a pizza parlor with cheeseburger and chicken vodka pizza. Also, roast beef and cinnamon rolls in Colorado Springs.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Between The Bread
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's always down for a good sandwich, so he's stopping in to check out some of the Triple D Nation's latest creations. A food truck in Nashville put down roots and started churning out cheesy concoctions.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: East Coast, West Coast
programme.desc: Guy visits a California joint to try spicy pork and knockout gnocchi.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Smoked, Grilled And Fried
programme.desc: Guy's diggin' into all kinds of meat: out of the smoker, on the grill and into the fryer.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Whole Lotta Comfort
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri dives into hearty helpings of comfort starting with a soul food spot dishing out Southern seafood and killer fried chicken in Atlanta.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Chew and Brew
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's grabbin' some grub cooked up at pubs! In Minneapolis, a big-time brewery cooking up dishes like righteous pulled pork and a killer brisket sandwich.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Round the World Roundup
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri digs into a world of flavours all over the United States! In Smyrna, Georgia, a doctor-turned-chef fires up amazing Asian from righteous ramen to Korean wings. In Austin, Texas, two buddies turn out their tasty take on tacos.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Old Faces, New Places
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's visiting some familiar Triple D faces and checking out their new places including a primo pizza joint in Flagstaff, Arizona firing up pies with not-your-everyday toppings.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Smoke And Seafood
programme.desc: Guys visits a Baltimore barbecue food truck for pulled pork and ribs, and a shrimp shack in Islamorada.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Pancakes, Potatoes And Pizza

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like a Pro: Weeknight Dinners
programme.desc: Ina Garten's got weeknight dinners covered, pro-style! There are Roasted Salmon Tacos with avocado salsa and a super quick slaw, then Cider Roasted Pork Tenderloin with an incredible make-ahead marinade and served with Fig Chutney.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Comfort Food Fake-Outs
programme.desc: Chef Bobby Flay recreates comfort food favorites for this whimsical and delicious brunch, with an exciting menu of Churro French Toast with a White Chocolate Orange dipping sauce, Cinnamon Bun Pancakes topped with a Maple Cream Cheese Glaze and more.

programme.title: Guy's Ranch Kitchen: Southern Spread
programme.desc: Guy Fieri invites his chef friends to bring the heartwarming hospitality of the South to the ranch. Marc Murphy puts his delicious spin on two Southern classics, shrimp and grits and charred corn salad with andouille sausage and red onion.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Comfort Food, Cuban-Style
programme.desc: Valerie remembers a wonderful weekend in Miami, where all the fragrances and tastes of authentic Cuban food inspire her to recreate some Cuban comfort magic in her own kitchen.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Fixin' Fence, Fixin' Lunch
programme.desc: Ree fixes up Ladd and Tim's favorite Tex-Mex lunch. There's grilled steak packed into hearty Rib Eye quesadillas, spicy perfect pinto beans and a taco ranch side salad.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Kitchen Confessional: Comfort Food
programme.desc: Ree is spilling the beans on her favorite comfort food. There are culinary hugs from chicken and dumplings.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Old-Fashioned Comfort
programme.desc: It's comfort from start to finish, and Ree Drummond's spelling it out in an old-fashioned, feel good way. First, C is for casserole -- tuna noodle casserole, that is. O is for open spaces and the great outdoors.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Drummond Home Cooking
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is making a special meal to deliver to Beverly, the curator of the Drummond family's historic home and museum. Recipes include grape lemonade, old fashioned chicken stew, and lemon raspberry cream cake.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Curling Club
programme.desc: Molly Yeh makes her most-prized Midwestern comfort foods with a twist. The hearty dishes include knoephla soup with the chewiest dumplings ever, sticky ribs and a side of sweet, tangy broccoli slaw with plump currants.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Kids Baking Championship Homecoming Day
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli is catching up with two of her all-time favourites from Kids Baking Championship, Nyah and Matthew. They already know how to bake, so Valerie is treating them to a kid-friendly savory meal that should be a cinch for them to conquer.

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown: Carolina Comfort
programme.desc: There's a chill in the air, and Kardea gathers friends around the fire pit for a cozy meal. Dinner includes some of her favourite rib-sticking staples- beef and okra stew served with sweet potatoes topped with roasted marshmallows.

programme.title: Giada Entertains: Weeknight Special
programme.desc: Giada De Laurentiis surprises her daughter, Jade, in the middle of the week with a special menu that includes all her favourite comfort foods.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Award-Winning Comfort Food
programme.desc: The Kitchen is honouring beloved comfort foods, starting with Sunny Anderson's "Crazy Rich" fried chicken and waffle skewers. The hosts dip into Katie Lee's creamy pimento cheese fondue and then announce the winner of the 49th Pillsbury Bake-Off Contest.

programme.title: Worst Cooks in America: Amore Sucre
programme.desc: It's a sweet week in boot camp, with the recruits playing a culinary version of Candyland in which they must identify sweet treats using all their senses.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Five-Star Showdown
programme.desc: Guy Fieri transforms Flavortown into a high-end restaurant and invites four chefs for three rounds of 5-star cooking. First he challenges them to elevate the ingredients in a frozen TV dinner, then to prepare signature dishes.

programme.title: Home Town: The Church House

programme.title: House Hunters: A Dash of L.A. Abracadabra

programme.title: House Hunters: Beachside in Branford
programme.desc: A couple hopes to leave their busy city life for the peaceful beachside community of Branford, Connecticut. The couple feels like this New England town is the perfect place for them to unwind after long shifts at the hospital where they work.

programme.title: House Hunters: Waffle Time on Emerald Isle
programme.desc: High school sweethearts are ready to move their waffle business to their favorite vacation spot on Emerald Isle, North Carolina. They're looking for a four bedroom house to the beach and their kids want a skate park and a waterslide.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Corbels and Chaos
programme.desc: Tamara sees great potential in a 1938 cottage with an unusual layout, unfinished renovation and no front door. She constructs a cathedral ceiling and creates two cedar corbels for the entrance. The cost of an egress window may crack her budget.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Skylight Surprise
programme.desc: Tamara struggles to install a full bath and enlarge the master suite as she continues to renovate the 1938 cottage. She successfully creates a hidden playroom in the kids' bedroom, but fails to win her dad's approval on her plan for the backyard shed.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: All About the Island
programme.desc: Tamara tackles a large 1905 colonial with seven sun porches. She overhauls an ugly kitchen and a dining room with tacky orange carpet, but unsupported floors and a strange noise during demo slow her plans and may cost her big money.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: A Closet Fit for a Queen
programme.desc: Tamara creates a 900-square-foot master suite and converts one of the home's seven sun porches into a closet. However, her budget takes a hit when she needs to install a new HVAC unit and her plan to save a vintage fireplace might be out of gas.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Condo Cleanup
programme.desc: A young millennial's recent home improvement projects have made it hard for her to sell her condo. Twins Leslie and Lyndsay transform her DIY disaster into a hip, modern home, perfect for a first-time home buyer.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Moving Sale Makeover
programme.desc: A couple is moving out of state for work and needs Leslie and Lyndsay's help to sell their home. The twins revamp their outdated ranch with a modern farmhouse style designed to reel in buyers who love to entertain.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: No Appeal to Curb Appeal
programme.desc: A couple that's desperate to sell their bungalow after receiving no offers calls on real estate experts and twins Leslie and Lyndsay. The home needs some love to make it sellable, but the stakes are raised when the twins invest money to make improvements.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Road House to Show House

programme.title: UFOs: Uncovering the Truth: Police UFO Files
programme.desc: Using archival audio recordings, official transcripts and incident reports, UFO researchers investigate what really happened during incredible, and sometimes life-threatening, encounters between law enforcement and UFOs.

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: Nazi UFO Secrets
programme.desc: Shocking evidence reveals the development of secret Nazi weapons not long after an alleged UFO crashed in Germany's Black Forest. UFO experts investigate whether the US government co-opted this technology for our own space and military programs.

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: UFO Tech
programme.desc: Technology has transformed the way we live with artificial intelligence, high-energy laser, antigravity technology and alien-looking aircraft. We discuss if these advances are due to human effort or contact with UFOs.

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: UFO Abduction
programme.desc: Only recently have researchers begun to understand and investigate the phenomenon of alien abduction. While today such claims are dismissed as hoax or delusion, there are time-tested, landmark cases that mainstream scholars struggle to refute.

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: UFOs vs. the Royal Air Force
programme.desc: The Royal Air Force has been encountering and even engaging UFOs on a regular basis since World War II, but the British government has continuously denied the sightings. Experts investigate why these UFO facts have been concealed.

programme.title: The Alaska Triangle: Hidden Lake Monster and Violent Spirits

programme.title: Wild West: Restless Shores

programme.title: Planet Earth: Yellowstone: Winter
programme.desc: In a land of beauty and peril, the dramatic lives and fortunes of its animals are inexorably bound together. Intimate and emotional, epic and engaging, 'Yellowstone' reveals the grandeur of this amazing place as its animals struggle to survive.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Yellowstone: Summer
programme.desc: As the snow melts, the extent of Yellowstone is revealed. Grizzly bears teach their young how to hunt fish and when to move out through valleys and grasslands into summer forests and up into the peaks. But summer here is fickle.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: Antarctica

programme.title: Wild West: Desert Heartlands
programme.desc: Travel from the cold deserts of Nevada to the giant cactus-studded lands of Arizona and the scorching Mojave Desert in California. Discover how some of America's most iconic animals like mustangs and coyotes have learned to survive.

programme.desc: In October 2016, after helping a friend fix his computer, 18-year-old tech prodigy, Sam Poss, takes off on foot and never returns home. Did the beloved teen run away? Was there an accident? Police work around the clock to find the truth.

programme.title: Stranger Among Us: Horror on the Homestead
programme.desc: When three respected members of a tight-knit community of award-winning Christmas tree farmers are brutally gunned down, terrified locals fear that a cold-blooded killer has been living among them for years.

programme.title: Stranger Among Us: Prescription for Murder
programme.desc: When one of their own is tortured and killed, a tight circle of Chicago doctors wonder if the killer came from within.

programme.title: Stranger Among Us: Homicide on the Rails
programme.desc: A spring break adventure turns deadly when a college student infiltrates a community of train hoppers.

programme.title: Body Cam: My Name is Death
programme.desc: Officers confront a knife-wielding suspect. In Florida, a man who flees into the woods is outsmarted by a K9 Officer. In Indiana, a gunman wages war on police, caught on surveillance cameras, until SWAT closes in.

programme.title: Body Cam: 90 Minutes
programme.desc: Police pursue a father and son, plus, an officer's life changes when he comes face-to-face with an armed suspect.

programme.title: Body Cam: Knife's Edge
programme.desc: In Ohio a man shoots his ex. She flees and violence erupts when an officer finds him. In Utah police are called to a house where a mother and children have escaped a suspect armed with a machete. In California a therapist is attacked by a former patient.

programme.title: Body Cam: Code 30
programme.desc: In New York state, a domestic disturbance takes a violent turn which changes a police chief's life. In Florida an officer chasing 2 suspects is separated from his K9. And in Indiana, an Officer stares down the barrel of a suspect's gun.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Fredericksburg
programme.desc: Following the strategic Union win at Antietam, Federal forces clash with a massive rebel army in the town of Fredericksburg, Virginia in what will become the largest fight of the Civil War.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Gettysburg
programme.desc: An elite band of Yankee Sharpshooters must stop Robert E. Lee's Alabamian shock troops from flanking the Union line and winning the battle of Gettysburg and perhaps the entire Civil War.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Vincent Gigante
programme.desc: Under the disguise of mental illness, Vincent Gigante evaded the authorities and rose to become the most powerful mobster in New York.

programme.title: Mafia Drug King: Carmine Galante
programme.desc: The story of Carmine Galante, who made money from selling heroin, and still profited from his drug empire while locked in prison.

programme.title: Lucky Luciano: Father of the Mob
programme.desc: The story of crime boss Charlie 'Lucky' Luciano, who used his Mafia connections to help the U.S. government during the Second World War in return for his parole.

programme.title: Al Capone: Public Enemy #1
programme.desc: America's first superstar gangster, Al Capone, dominated headlines and is said to be responsible for the bloody St Valentines' Day Massacre. After being made the face of organized crime by US government Capone's public image brings about his downfall.

programme.title: John Gotti: The Teflon Don
programme.desc: The story of ambitious American mobster John Gotti, who became the boss of the Gambino family by ordering the death of the group's former head. He earned the nickname 'Teflon Don' after three acquittals.

programme.title: Mob Citizen: Joe Colombo
programme.desc: The story of mobster Joe Colombo, whose love of fame and money was matched by his determination to campaign against Italian-American harassment in the United States.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Revolution
programme.desc: A look at how Russia sealed themselves behind an Iron Curtain, a move that spawned the birth of revolutions across East Europe and beyond.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Peace and War
programme.desc: By the mid 1970s, the Cold War has remained a fact of life for decades. But 30 years into the war, and the doctrine of mutually assured destruction doesn't feel like a roadmap to peace. It's an arms race, a propaganda and at times, a deadly game.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Paranoia
programme.desc: As the propaganda war and the arms race rage on, the 1950's becomes the decade of paranoia. The stalemate between democracy and communism reaches a fever pitch as the world descends further in chaos.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Designed for Power
programme.desc: Hitler's mastery of propaganda, and instinct for effective design, used to create everything from the swastika flag to the striking uniforms of the storm troopers, help win huge support for the Nazi party, a vital step in its march towards total power.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Hitler's Highways
programme.desc: Hitler promises to make Germany great again by creating 14,000 miles of freeway and building one and half million 'People's Cars' every year. Instead, the Nazi war economy relies on millions of forced labourers and prisoners.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: The Industry of War
programme.desc: Hitler is determined to rebuild Germany's military strength after the destruction of almost all its weaponry in the First World War. To overcome his country's dire shortage of raw materials, he plans to steal them from other countries.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Mountain Massacre
programme.desc: The Black Devils, a joint American-Canadian mountain warfare unit, are about to go into action. They must mount a do-or-die night-time assault up a treacherous mountain, in extreme weather, to take on heavily-entrenched battle hardened German defenses.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Strike From the Sky
programme.desc: British light infantry must crash land by glider in Northern France then take and hold two key bridges in the hands of a heavily armed enemy.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Commando Do or Die
programme.desc: British commandos attempt a head-on amphibious assault against a heavily-defended enemy port. Their mission is to take out the dock facilities of St. Nazaire before they become a base for Germany's biggest battleship.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: SAS vs. Rommel
programme.desc: The SAS launches a daring raid behind enemy lines on a German airfield in the Sahara Desert. If they succeed in destroying Rommel's supply planes, their action could turn the tide of war and allow the British to drive the Germans out of North Africa.

programme.title: Building Alaska: The Big Lift
programme.desc: Mike and his team get the rafters and roofing underway but with no lack of challenges. Dave and Hans are on their own with setting the extremely heavy ridge beam until help arrives. Adam successfully transports all of his logs to his build site.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Lost in Logs
programme.desc: Dave and Hans have two 700-hundred pound ridgepoles to set. Running out of weatherproofing Mike is forced to forge ahead in dodgy weather. For builder Adam, a faster pace comes to a screeching halt when two crucial logs go missing.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Bush Alaska Approved
programme.desc: The tides become the ultimate decider for Dave, Hans, and Steve, and send Steve to the workshop. For builder Adam and his family, the weather can't dampen their excitement as they finish their cabin. Mike is racing the first snowfall.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Kids' Dream Lake House
programme.desc: Chase Morrill and his team help a DIY homeowner jumpstart his project and renovate with kids in mind. With a budget of $30,000 and a July 1st deadline, the masters are going to have to use their imagination on this one.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Love Yurts
programme.desc: In a show first, Chase and the crew are tasked with a relocation and land manifestation of a family yurt on an island on Togus Pond. The team enter uncharted waters knowing they have to move quickly before the pond freezes.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Taking It to the Finish Line
programme.desc: Chase and the team are hired to finish a cabin for a homeowner that's been collecting materials for years but just hasn't been able to finish the project.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Ho-Ho-Home!
programme.desc: Doug, aka Santa, and his wife Lois inherited a 1,250-square-foot cabin that's been in her family since 1958. With no major renovations since the 1970s, Chase and the team are excited to perform a Christmas miracle and transform this cabin.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Cabin for the Bride
programme.desc: Chase and his team are back home in Augusta getting ready for Lance's wedding. Chase gets a call about a little log cabin stuck in a backyard. He sees the cabin as a fun project for the team to work on and present to Lance's lovely bride.

programme.title: Restored: The Yellow Victorian Farmhouse Facelift
programme.desc: Brett restores a Victorian farmhouse with an odd floor plan. Major foundation issues complicate the project, but the happy homeowners end up with a beautiful and functional house they could never have imagined.

programme.title: Restored: Restoring a Craftsman Bungalow
programme.desc: Restoration expert Brett Waterman is hired to restore a 1913 Arts and Crafts bungalow. This 100 year-old home has experienced incomplete renovations and numerous bad choices over the years. Brett rediscovers the home's history and architectural features.

programme.title: Restored: 1940s Modern Ranch
programme.desc: Brett restores a 1941 modern ranch in Redlands, CA, for a couple who recently inherited the home from her grandfather.

programme.title: Restored: 1913 Mission Revival Mansion
programme.desc: Brett Waterman helps a mother and her grown-up children restore their majestic 1913 Mission Revival mansion. He's elated when he realizes he can restore the original linoleum in the kitchen, but the homeowners may not open to the idea.

programme.title: Restored: 1923 Mediterranean Revival
programme.desc: Brett's new clients recently purchased their first home together, a 1923 Mediterranean Revival, and want to restore it after years of small updates from the previous owners.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Pilsbury Family Rafting Cabin
programme.desc: Builder Chase Morrill teams up with his brother, sister and best friend to save and transform abandoned Maine cabins. They give these forlorn properties the facelift they've needed for decades. You never know what you might find when you go for a walk.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Cabin in Training
programme.desc: A couple purchased a quaint cabin with an accompanying railroad caboose. The team transform both spaces to create a camp by enlarging the main cabin with more sleeping space and indoor plumbing while the caboose provides more storage and bunk space.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Dated Cabin Turned Retreat
programme.desc: Chase and his team take on a dated and dysfunctional cabin in Belgrade Lakes, one of Maine's most desirable regions. They try to turn the cabin into the perfect family retreat with a budget of $40,000 and six weeks.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Diamond in the Rough

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Denver
programme.desc: Andrew explores the frontier fare of Denver, Colorado. From classic game meats remade for the modern palette to the signature green chilli sauce of Den-Mex cuisine, Denver has become the region's cultural hub with an abundance of top-shelf food.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Cartagena
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern shows off the tempting flavors of Cartagena, Colombia. From fried fish and sizzling egg arepas to bedroom-boosting fruits and seafood stews, the taste of the coast infuses every bite.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Cape Cod
programme.desc: Andrew explores the treasures of Cape Cod's coastal cuisine. From fried clams to fresh-caught cod, clambakes to cranberry bog ice cream, the Massachusetts peninsula's culinary scene is cause for summertime celebration.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Key West
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern delights in the fun and funky flavors of Key West, Florida. From conch fritters, coconut pink shrimp and fried hogfish sandwiches to toasty Cubanos and quintessential Key lime pie, Key West is full of fresh eats and local ingredients.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: San Francisco
programme.desc: Look no further than San Francisco, California for the best eating on the West Coast. Built on classics like Dungeness Crab Louie and sourdough bread, Andrew Zimmern discovers just what makes the City by the Bay so delectable.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Jamaica
programme.desc: In a country celebrated for its colorful culture, Jamaica's heritage-rich food lives up to the hype. Andrew Zimmern explores island icons from jerk chicken and mannish water soup, to curry goat, blue mountain coffee, and gizzadas.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Bringing Back Baby/A Penguin In The Desert
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy show Peggy, the Polar Bear, the benefits of having a baby brother when she tries to return him to T.O.T.S. Pip and Freddy brave the desert heat to deliver a camel.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: The Fearful Flier/ Lend Me Your Paw
programme.desc: Bodhi faces his fear to earn his final stamp towards becoming a Super Flier. After Mia gets a thorn stuck in her paw, she worries it will hurt when K.C. tries to take it out.

programme.title: Bluey: Mum and Dads / Mount Mumandad / Asparagus
programme.desc: Rusty and Indy have a disagreement; Bluey and Bingo pretend Mum and Dad are a mountain; Dad teaches Bluey table manners.

programme.title: Vampirina: The Great Esmeralda / Frog's Breath
programme.desc: Vee sets out to make sure a reading from The Great Esmeralda doesn't come true; Vee turns herself into a frog.

programme.title: Vampirina: The Boo Boys Are Back/ Pixie Problem
programme.desc: The Ghoul Girls and Poltergeist Pat perform at the Paranormal Pop Festival. A pixie family is visiting the B&B!

programme.title: Muppet Babies: Finders Keepers/ Monster Next Door
programme.desc: Rizzo discovers emeralds in the sandbox and has to decide whether to keep them or not; the Muppet Babies must rescue Potato after he accidentally ends up with a monster.

programme.title: Muppet Babies: The Best, Best Friend / Counting Kermits
programme.desc: When he fears he's losing his BFF, Fozzie tries to prove he's Kermit's BEST best friend. Bunsen and Beaker invent a Make-Another-You-Inator to help Kermit play four games at once.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Add-a-Dad/ Squirrely Puffs
programme.desc: Dad is too busy to spend quality time with Timmy, so he wishes up 'a-lot-a-dads' to hang out with. It's a race between the Squirrely Scouts and the Cream Puffs to the top of Mount Doom.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Turner and Pooch/ Dumbbell Curve
programme.desc: Crocker seeks out a new source of magic from Timmy's house. Realizing it's Sparky, Crocker tries to turn him against Timmy. Crocker grades on a bell curve so Timmy wishes everyone was dumber than him.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: A Boy and His Dog-Boy/ Crock Blocked
programme.desc: Timmy wishes Sparky was a human. Timmy becomes a dog and has to convince Sparky to change back to canine form. Timmy wishes Mr. Crocker would disappear. Mr. Crocker becomes invisible. Dad thinks the house is haunted.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: The Big Problem/ Power Mad
programme.desc: Timmy wants to do 'adult' things; Chester and AJ are stranded in virtual reality.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Mutiny/ Reality or Not
programme.desc: Desperate to avenge last year's loss, The Chipmunks argue over who is best suited to lead them to victory. Later, Alvin is tired of seeing his celebrity status overshadowed by Reality TV stars. So, he decides to become one.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Time Flies/ Prank Calls
programme.desc: Alvin and Brittany are convinced Simon has vanished back in time and go all out in an attempt to bring him back. A prank call by Alvin gets out of hand when the person on the other end of the line vows to track him down.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Fast and the Furriest/ Mascot Melee
programme.desc: Donnie's newly built Turtle Tank goes missing. In order to get a birthday gift for Splinter, the Turtles have to take on thuggish Times Square Mascots.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Late Fee/ Bullhop
programme.desc: The endless craziness of New York complicates the returning of a DVD; the Turtles try to help a distressed mutant.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Mind Meld/ Nothing But Truffle
programme.desc: Donnie gets more than he bargained for when he 'enhances' his brothers' intelligence. And, Mikey and Meat Sweats become BFFs after a bizarre transformation.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: You Got Served/ How to Make Enemies and Bend People to Your Will
programme.desc: Leo and Mikey get sidetracked by a brotherly competition while helping Señor Hueso. And, Baron Draxum struggles to move up in the Foot Clan.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Mystic Library/ The Purple Game
programme.desc: The Turtles plumb the depths of a mysterious hidden library in search of a way to rescue Mayhem. A competitive new video game has swept New York and Donnie will do anything to reach rank number one.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Operation: Normal/ Sparring Partner
programme.desc: Leo and Donnie try desperately to help April enjoy a quiet day with a new friend. Raph becomes friends with a new sparring partner and must keep it secret from his brothers who don't like the guy.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Little Yellow Book/ Bumper to Bumper
programme.desc: Squidward finds SpongeBob's diary, and starts reading it out loud in the Krusty Krab.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: A Friendly Game/ Sentimental Sponge
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick build an indoor miniature golf course in SpongeBob's house. SpongeBob has trouble throwing anything away when he realizes how many memories are attached to all his possessions.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Extreme Sports/ Squirrel Record
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick try to join the extreme sports team the Drasticals. Also, Sandy finds a book of world's records and tries to break them all with SpongeBob's help.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Eek, an Urchin!/ Squid's Defense
programme.desc: Squidward wants SpongeBob and Sandy to teach him karate after being robbed of his groceries. SpongeBob goes to great lengths to force out a pesky sea urchin from the Krusty Krab.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: It Came From Goo Lagoon
programme.desc: A giant goo bubble emerges from Goo Lagoon and threatens all of Bikini Bottom. Plankton plans to use the bubble for his own evil ends.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SpongeBob, You're Fired!
programme.desc: In order to save money, Mr. Krabs fires SpongeBob; however, unable to just "do nothing", SpongeBob decides to go back to work, no matter what - or where.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Executive Treatment / Squid Plus One
programme.desc: While trying to order a special sandwich, Patrick gets swept up in the fast paced world of business. Later, Squidward receives an invitation to a gallery opening and scrambles to find a friend to take with him.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SpongeBob LongPants/ Larry's Gym
programme.desc: SpongeBob gets a pair of long pants, but they change his life in unexpected ways.When Larry the Lobster opens a new gym in Bikini Bottom, SpongeBob becomes his best customer.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Mall Girl Pearl/ Two Thumbs Down
programme.desc: Pearl gets a job to be cool like her friends, but the only store that's hiring is the lamest store at the mall. SpongeBob loses the use of his thumbs, and must get them back in working order before his entire life falls apart.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Karen 2.0/ Inspongeiac
programme.desc: Plankton's wife is replaced by a better version at work; Spongebob can't sleep.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Bubblestand/ Ripped Pants
programme.desc: The art of bubble blowing; Bob rips his pants at Mussel Beach.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Slide Whistle Stooges
programme.desc: Squidward gets annoyed when SpongeBob and Patrick get new slide whistles and play them non-stop.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sandy's Rocket/ Squeaky Boots
programme.desc: Bob and Pat accidentally launch Sandy's rocket ship into space; boots in lieu of pay.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Musclebob Buffpants/ Squidward, the Unfriendly Ghost
programme.desc: Squidward pretends to be a ghost to get Patrick and Spongebob to leave him in peace.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SB-129/ Karate Choppers
programme.desc: Squidward ends up in a freezer; Bob and Sandy's incessant karate sparring wreaks havoc.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Hooky/ Mermaidman and Barnacleboy II
programme.desc: Patrick and SpongeBob ignore warnings; SpongeBob follows superheroes for a day.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Something Smells/ Bossy Boots
programme.desc: Bob eats some sea-onion ice cream; Mr. Krabs' daughter makes some big changes.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Dying for Pie/ Imitation Krabs
programme.desc: Squidward lets Bob eat an exploding pie; Plankton disguises himself as Mr. Krabs.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Talkin' Teddy/ Principal Interest
programme.desc: Theodore's new talking-teddy bear is driving Alvin and Simon nuts. Alvin is none-too thrilled about going back to school. That is until he sees the new Principal and then it's love at first sight.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Theozilla/ Doggone It
programme.desc: When Alvin is paired with Simon for a Science project, he accidentally creates a potion that turns Theodore into a 30-foot giant. Later, when all the phones at school are missing, Alvin is blamed and he tries to clear his name.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: I Will Survive/ Alvin's Got a Brand New Bag
programme.desc: When Alvin gets hurt, Simon agrees to face off against Derek on a survival reality show, where there's room for only one winner. Alvin accidentally ruins Brittany's favorite new bag and must come up with a way to replace it.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: The Temp/ Parent Trap
programme.desc: When Bocarter's father helps him with his class project, Alvin enlists Dave's help, locking the two families in a heated competition.

programme.title: Movie: Surf's Up
programme.desc: A star lifeguard helps an enthusiastic penguin who enters a surfing competition.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Gumbus/ Mrs. Cuddles
programme.desc: Leo, Mikey and April investigate a mysterious specter that haunts a themed supermarket./ April and the brothers make Raph face his greatest fear… an adorable kids’ TV show bunny.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Turtle Temper
programme.desc: Raphael loses his temper when he is insulted by a New Yorker named Vic.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: New Friend, Old Enemy
programme.desc: Michelangelo tries to prove humans can be friends with Turtles.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Members Only/ The New Kid
programme.desc: Alvin helps the mathletes stand up to the school bullies, but in the process they become bullies themselves. Alvin befriends a lonely new kid in school, but Theodore discovers the new student may not be who he says he is.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Wacky Wednesday/ The Chipmunk and the Catfish
programme.desc: When one of Simon's inventions malfunctions, Jeanette and Alvin switch places. Theodore creates a fake alias online and pretends to be a girl.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures: Buster/ Evil Layers
programme.desc: Buster Lloyd gets the opportunity to live out his fantasy of being a police officer. Duke DeTain and Shirley Keeper investigate the true identity of the Master Criminal.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures: Race to the Top/ Meet Harl Hubbs
programme.desc: Fendrich and Sinclair compete to win the City's tallest building contest. An off-screen narrator, narrates a day in the life of helpful handyman, Harl Hubbs.

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World: Legend of Isla Nublar: Mission Critical!
programme.desc: Owen and Claire must rescue a theme-park reviewer from a sabotaged aerial tram and a salivating T-Rex.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Spaced Out/ Transparents
programme.desc: Timmy wishes for an authentic alien; Cosmo and Wanda must pose as real parents.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Chin Up/ Dogs Day Afternoon
programme.desc: Timmy wishes his favourite comic book hero into reality; Timmy becomes a dog.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Mystic Mayhem
programme.desc: The Turtles discover for the first time that they’re not the weirdest things in New York.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Origami Tsunami/ Donnie’s Gifts
programme.desc: Our wannabe heroes try to solve the biggest little problem in the city. The Turtles have to fight their bad habits and a mutant chef.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Stuck on You/ Al Be Back
programme.desc: After an unfortunate “glue” accident, the Turtles have to fight a whole host of villains. The Turtles’ first public musical gig is interrupted by Albearto and his animatronic army.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Gorytelling/ A Few Good Monsters
programme.desc: When Cornelius Shivers reveals that he's writing a book about the hotel, each member of the Dracula family hopes to outdo the others with their own story. After a family heirloom is destroyed, the children are considered the only suspects.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Afterlifestyles of the Rich and Mavis/ The Mavysitters Club
programme.desc: Mavis and her friends put their ideas for the hotel into motion.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Urban Legend/ Wishing Well
programme.desc: When Bill learns that Gramma has been purposely creating a frightening reputation around town, he throws a barbeque to befriend the neighbors. Cricket makes a wishing well to cash in on people making wishes.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Shark Objects / Dream Weaver
programme.desc: When Greens try to spend an eventful day at the beach, Cricket tries to prank the beach-goers; Cricket discovers he can influence the family's dreams to disastrous real-life results.

programme.title: Amphibia: Children of the Spore/ Anne of the Year
programme.desc: A scary mushroom adventure! Anne wins the prestigious “Frog of the Year” award and gets to plan her own party, but the frogs of Wartwood may not be ready for a human-style bash.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Wand Ambition/ Lost in Transylvation
programme.desc: Mavis' lost magic wand falls into the wrong hands and Hotel Transylvania gets trapped inside a snow globe. Mavis finally gets a word in the Vamptionary!

programme.title: DuckTales: A Nightmare on Killmotor Hill!
programme.desc: The kids are pulled into a world made of their wildest dreams. Unfortunately, Lena's worst nightmare comes true: Magica De Spell is back and coming to reclaim what's hers.

programme.title: Lego Marvel Super Heroes - Guardians of the Galaxy: The Thanos Threat: The Thanos Threat
programme.desc: The Guardians of the Galaxy must protect the Build Stone from Thanos, Ronan, Nebula, and the Ravagers.

programme.title: LEGO Marvel Spider-Man: Vexed by Venom
programme.desc: Our friendly neighborhood Spider-Man must stop the evil Green Goblin and Venom from stealing key pieces of technology that could ultimately destroy New York City.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Who Let the Frogs Out?
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: DuckTales: Storkules in Duckburg!
programme.desc: Louie recruits Storkules for his professional monster extermination business, while Storkules faces his greatest challenge: being Donald’s roommate.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Outlaw Scrooge McDuck!
programme.desc: In the Old West, Scrooge and Goldie form a band of outlaws and stage a heist to save a small town from corrupt businessman, John D. Rockerduck.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: It's No Picnic/ Steampunx
programme.desc: Two stepbrothers build various objects with materials found around their home.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Great Balls of Water/ Where's Pinky?
programme.desc: When Candace thinks Jeremy is bored with their usual hangouts, she sets out to find something unique to do with him. When Pinky goes missing, Phineas and Ferb create a machine that amplifies Buford's sense to those of a dog's.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Baymax Returns Part I and II
programme.desc: Join Hiro right after he learns that Baymax is lost in the portal forever. He discovers the chip that Tadashi designed to create Baymax. Hiro begins school as the new prodigy at San Fransokyo Institute of Technology and sets out to rebuild Baymax.

programme.title: Amphibia: Croak and Punishment/ Trip to the Archives
programme.desc: When Sprig's Blue Moon Shell is stolen, he and Anne investigate to find the crook. To prepare for Anne's quest, the Plantars go to the archives and accidentally get trapped!

programme.title: Amphibia: Snow Day/ Cracking Mrs. Croaker
programme.desc: When a winter cold snap freezes all the frogs in Wartwood, Anne must protect the townspeople. In an effort to make Mrs. Croaker like him, Sprig digs up a secret from her past.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Too Cool for High School

programme.title: Walk the Prank: NBA Edition
programme.desc: When Dusty posts a rude comment about him, NBA Superstar Caron Butler pays him a visit to teach the gang a lesson about online safety.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Lord of the Gummmy Worms

programme.title: Walk the Prank: The Rise and Fall of Courtney Lynn

programme.title: NFL 100 Roundtables: The Linebackers
programme.desc: Legendary linebackers come together to share their stories in a roundtable discussion. Ray Lewis, Mike Singletary, Harry Carson, Willie Lanier, and Lawrence Taylor are featured.

programme.title: NFL 100 Roundtables: The Defensive Backs
programme.desc: Legendary defensive backs come together to share their stories in a roundtable discussion. Deion Sanders, Ronnie Lott, Charles Woodson, Darrell Green, Darrelle Revis and Rod Woodson are featured.

programme.title: NFL 100 Roundtables: The Quarterbacks
programme.desc: Legendary quarterbacks come together to share their stories in a roundtable discussion. Kurt Warner, John Elway, Jim Kelly, Joe Namath, Roger Staubach and Dan Fouts are featured.

programme.title: Indivisible With Nate Boyer: New Orleans
programme.desc: Nate experiences the city's continued post-Katrina rebirth through some of its most iconic dining establishments, and witnesses the economic and opportunity struggles that still exist. The integration in the Superdome also takes center stage.

programme.title: Indivisible With Nate Boyer: Cleveland
programme.desc: A local restaurateur guides Nate through the resurgent city as he explores a social-minded culinary school and the revitalization of a local high school football field. An exploration of second chances, working class struggle and community policing.

programme.title: Indivisible With Nate Boyer: New York
programme.desc: A slam poet takes Nate to a special school that infuses music and scientific learning, and a Harlem barber fights gentrification with a unique entrepreneurial approach. Players from the Giants and Jets combat homelessness and inequality.

programme.title: Indivisible With Nate Boyer: Miami
programme.desc: Nate joins a Miami Dolphin to explore police outreach in the community, and dives with military vets to examine an effort to save coral reefs. The long season's journey concludes at the site of Super Bowl LIV.

programme.title: A Football Life: Doug Williams
programme.desc: Doug Williams grew up with no running water in rural Louisiana during an era when few African Americans played quarterback. He would overcome adversity and prejudice to become a Heisman nominee, first round pick and Super Bowl MVP.

programme.title: A Football Life: Jerry Rice
programme.desc: 'A Football Life' chronicles the story of how an un-recruited small-town wide receiver became the greatest of all time.

programme.title: A Football Life: Michael Strahan
programme.desc: Strahan's story encompasses his time as the heart of the New York Giants championship defense and his new chapter as a broadcasting and talk show star.

programme.title: Top 10: HBCU Players
programme.desc: Count down the top ten players from historically black colleges and universities.

programme.title: Movie: Miracle
programme.desc: The true story of the 1980 U.S. Olympic hockey team who claimed victory over the Russians.

programme.desc: All the highlights of the fast-paced action around the NHL every night.

programme.title: Movie: Soul Plane
programme.desc: Last-minute passenger additions shake things up on an airline's maiden flight.

programme.title: Martin: Momma's Baby, Martin's Maybe

programme.title: Martin: Get a Job
programme.desc: Martin and Gina go undercover to try and discover what Tommy does for a living.

programme.title: Martin: Feast or Famine
programme.desc: The gang decides to hold a contest to see which gender is the better cook at Thanksgiving.

programme.title: Martin: Lockin' Boots

programme.title: Martin: Go Tell It on the Martin
programme.desc: A distraught man with a bomb strapped to him takes over the station during Martin's show.

programme.title: Martin: 'Xpress Yourself
programme.desc: Gina regrets the changes she was hired to make in Martin's show when Martin changes too.

programme.title: Martin: Sophisticated Ladies
programme.desc: Gina and Pam's dreams of joining an exclusive women's club are jeopardized by Sheneneh.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Ethnic Tip
programme.desc: Will complains that no black history is being taught in his school and Vivian takes over.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: The Young and the Restless
programme.desc: Philip becomes very upset when Will sneaks out with Philip's mother to a rap concert.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: It Had to Be You
programme.desc: Jazz fixes Will up with his sister, Janet, who turns out to be an extremely bossy girl.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Nice Lady
programme.desc: Will tries to prove that he's a responsible person so he can take the car to Nevada.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Love at First Fight
programme.desc: One of Vivian's college students' grades start to slide when she starts dating Will.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Banks Shot
programme.desc: Philip saves the day after Will borrows the car to go to a pool hall and gets hustled.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: 72 Hours
programme.desc: Carlton accepts Will's challenge to survive two days in a tough Los Angeles neighbourhood.

programme.title: Love and Hip-Hop: Some Sticky Big Bizness
programme.desc: Yandy pitches her business plan to the Mayor of Newark. Joe Budden and Tahiry explore a new relationship. Newcomer Jennaske pits Rich Dollaz against Phresher. Erica Mena discovers a text that jeopardizes her wedding. And Chrissy confronts Yandy.

programme.title: Love and Hip-Hop: Ex’s & Oh’s
programme.desc: Safaree is forced to set things right to save his wedding. Cyn confronts Erica about her plan to match Tahiry back with Joe. Phresher must fight to keep Jennaske from jumping ship after Jen's public explosion. Remy goes to Miami to finish her album.

programme.title: Love and Hip-Hop: Between a Rock and a Hard Place
programme.desc: Erica and Safaree's joint bachelor, bachelorette party takes a turn when an unexpected guest arrives. Yandy gets some surprising news. Jennaske's decision to work exclusively with Rich Dollaz causes backlash. PHresher's past comes back to haunt him.

programme.title: Love and Hip-Hop: Happily Mena After
programme.desc: After the chaos of his bachelor party, Safaree gets cold feet about the wedding. Erica gets some timely advice from Remy Ma.

programme.title: Love and Hip-Hop: Whose Birthday Is It Anyway?
programme.desc: Erica Mena's birthday bash takes a turn when Tahiry confronts Cyn. Jim Jones learns to cook with Joe to rekindle his romance with Chrissy. Jada demands her money back from PHresher. Tahiry gets some terrifying health news.

programme.title: Movie: Anything for Love
programme.desc: Katherine believes men are intimidated by her career, creates an internet dating profile claiming she is an executive assistant rather than a high-powered executive.

programme.title: Movie: Love in Store
programme.desc: Two rival home shopping hosts are forced together while competing for a promotion. Along the way they find their on-air chemistry kindles an off-air spark.

programme.title: When Calls the Heart: A Moving Picture
programme.desc: Lucas gives Elizabeth writing advice that causes her to search for new inspiration. Rosemary and Lee plan a vacation. Faith returns home with a dilemma that may force her to part ways from Carson.

programme.title: When Hope Calls: New Hope
programme.desc: Sisters Lillian and Grace face disapproval when they establish an orphanage in Lillian's hometown. When a fire breaks out, they are swept up in the community's effort to prevent the blaze from engulfing the town.

programme.title: Movie: From Friend to Fiancé
programme.desc: A quirky girl in her early 30's has it all, except the perfect man. Her childhood BFF wants her to be the best "man" at his wedding, but after spending time together planning his wedding to her former rival, she realizes he is the one she wants.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Room Seven
programme.desc: Sophia has an after-life experience, seeing her late husband in heaven, while choking on a piece of candy. Meanwhile, Blanche is distraught over the demolition of her grandmother's plantation, so the girls travel to Atlanta.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: From Here to the Pharmacy
programme.desc: A man Blanche has no memory of returns from the Persian Gulf in hopes of fulfilling the promise she supposedly made to him before he left, that she will be his and only his.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Pope's Ring
programme.desc: The Pope's in town and Sophia goes to his mass. When she goes to kiss his ring, it slips off into hers. Meanwhile, Rose is convinced Miles is hiding something from her, so as a birthday gift, Blanche gives Rose a detective to spy on Miles.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Old Boyfriends
programme.desc: Sophia's attempts at trying to find a man go awry when a man she meets through the personals turns out to have a shadow, his sister.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Goodbye, Mr. Gordon
programme.desc: Dorothy is contacted by a high school teacher she once had a crush on. They quickly begin seeing each other and Dorothy is convinced his feelings are genuine.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Commitments
programme.desc: Dorothy asks Blanche to go out with her blind date when she wins tickets to Beatlemania.

programme.title: Frasier: The Dog That Rocks the Cradle
programme.desc: Roz hires Bulldog, her former lover who is now delivering pizzas, to babysit her daughter.

programme.title: Frasier: Rivals

programme.title: Frasier: A Tsar Is Born

programme.title: Frasier: The Late Dr. Crane
programme.desc: A man posing as Frasier drops dead and the mix-up allows Frasier to read his obituary.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: The Great Train Robbery
programme.desc: Lucy is sure her train trip to New York will be filled with intrigue and romance.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Homecoming

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Person to Person
programme.desc: Ricky's new fame leads to an invitation to appear on 'Person to Person.'

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Questions and Answers
programme.desc: Dorothy desperately schemes to become a contestant on the game show Jeopardy.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Ebbtide VI: The Wrath of Stan
programme.desc: As associate producer of Wake Up Miami, Rose needs a hot news story for sweeps week.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Journey to the Center of Attention
programme.desc: Blanche tries to cheer up a lonely Dorothy by taking her out to her favourite bar.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: A Midwinter Night's Dream
programme.desc: An ancient family curse requires Sophia to save Dorothy by performing strange tasks.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: A Midwinter Night's Dream
programme.desc: The full moon and festivities prompt strange happenings including Blanche's jewelry being swiped, Sophia trying to break a curse, and Dorothy and Miles sharing a passionate kiss.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Rose: Portrait of a Woman
programme.desc: Dorothy gives a speech at Career Day and is offered a job as a motivational trainer.

programme.title: Home and Family
programme.desc: Sit down with actresses Lauren Ash and Madeleine Arthur. Food and lifestyle expert Brandi Miloy stops by.

programme.title: Home and Family
programme.desc: Actor Robert Buckley from the Hallmark Channel original movie ‘Love in Store' visits. Suzanne Somers talks about her book 'A New Way to Age'. Chef Toya Boudy is in the kitchen.

programme.title: Movie: Love, Once and Always
programme.desc: When Lucy's childhood sweetheart plans to tear down the Gilded Age estate and replace it with a golf course, Lucy fights to preserve the historic mansion at all costs.

programme.title: Movie: Horrible Bosses
programme.desc: When three friends realize that quitting their jobs isn't an option they conspire to murder their bosses.

programme.title: Movie: Father Figures
programme.desc: After having been told their entire lives that their father died when they were young, a pair of twin brothers learn that their mother doesn't actually know who their father is. Armed with a list of potential dads, they set out on a road trip to find him.

programme.title: Movie: The Hangover
programme.desc: Two days before his wedding, three friends decide to take a groom to Las Vegas. Since the bride-to-be doesn't approve of bachelor parties, the men lie to her about their trip. After a wild night of partying, the guys wake up to find the groom missing.

programme.title: Movie: Horrible Bosses 2
programme.desc: Three downtrodden working stiffs decide to launch their own business, but a slick investor stops them in their tracks. They hatch a half-baked scheme to kidnap the investor's son and demand a ransom, with which they can reclaim their business.

programme.title: Awkwafina Is Nora From Queens: Savage Valley
