programme.desc: The staff at Seattle Grace discover that doctors can be the most challenging patients.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Bring the Pain
programme.desc: Meredith and Dr. Shepherd have to use more than medicine when a young woman's traditionalist, religious father forbids her to have a life-saving operation. Meanwhile, George and Alex are forced to perform surgery under less than ideal conditions.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Into You Like a Train
programme.desc: As Meredith awaits a decision from Derek, her angst is interrupted when a train crash brings injured patients to the hospital. When Addison Shepherd notes Izzie's potential, Izzie must choose between professional gain and her friendship with Meredith.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Something to Talk About
programme.desc: Cristina, Izzie and Meredith pursue the case of Shane, a male patient who seems to have a hysterical pregnancy, which fascinates them and the entire medical staff. Elsewhere, a young patient inspires Alex to better express his feelings for Izzie.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Let It Be
programme.desc: Derek and Addison Shepherd's professional relationship is challenged when their closest friends come to the hospital seeking a pre-emptive operation to avoid breast and ovarian cancer. George can't understand why a patient is unhappy to survive a fall.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Thanks for the Memories
programme.desc: The Thanksgiving holiday is more difficult for the interns and residents than any of them are willing to admit. Izzie plans a dinner at Meredith's but it remains to be seen who will show up. George endures the O'Malley tradition of hunting turkey.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Much Too Much
programme.desc: Meredith is mortified when her 'one night stand' shows up at the hospital in need of medical attention; a woman carrying quintuplets is overwhelmed by numerous medical issues as she navigates her high-risk pregnancy; Alex's shortcomings frustrate Izzie.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Owner of a Lonely Heart
programme.desc: Christina has little sympathy for a prison inmate who jeopardized her health to get out of solitary confinement; the interns keep careful watch on a family of premature quintuplets with a variety of serious health challenges; Izzy angers Alex.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Visibility Zero
programme.desc: Analyzing the Amtrack Sunset Limited crash in 1993.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Flashover
programme.desc: A fire erupted in the Kings Cross Underground Station in London.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Smoking Out a Killer
programme.desc: Three college students are killed walking along a footpath over the course of six years. Police know they're dealing with a serial killer, but the hard part is catching him.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Vow of Silence
programme.desc: When a man's friends report his mail-order bride missing, police soon orient their investigation around the husband. While following up on some leads, they dig up some evidence tying him to deaths of two other wives.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pastoral Care
programme.desc: The body of a female prison guard shows up in a landfill and investigators suspect the hundreds of prisoners in the facility where she worked.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Badge of Betrayal
programme.desc: With no suspects or motives, investigators can't make sense of a murder when a young woman is found dead near the highway. A tiny piece of unique fibre on the victim's clothing will lead to the most unlikely killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Voice From Beyond
programme.desc: When a decomposed body is found stuffed in a barrel, it's easy to presume murder. But the body had been placed in the barrel 30 years earlier.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Stranger in the Night
programme.desc: When his mother is found dead, a Delaware man tells a story so improbable that police don't believe it. While there's no evidence directly tying him to the crime, investigators are certain he knows more than he's saying, until forensic testing is done.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Talking Skull
programme.desc: A mapmaker was surveying the grounds of a boy scout ranch when something caught his eye. At first, it appeared to be a turtle shell, but it proved to be a human skull.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Signed, Sealed, and Delivered
programme.desc: When a bomb explodes in a home, police believe it was an act of revenge.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The List Murders
programme.desc: For 18 years, a man who murdered his entire family successfully eluded the FBI. Investigators used art and forensic science to find the killer and bring him to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dirty Little Seacret
programme.desc: A couple spent Memorial Day weekend at the beach, and then they simply vanished. A week later, police would get an unexpected lead from a robbery in progress, and the evidence they found helped solve a crime of unparalleled violence and brutality.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Buried Secrets
programme.desc: A fire leads investigators to re-examine an unusual death.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: On the Rocks
programme.desc: The naked body of a young woman is discovered in a remote area leading forensic investigators on a search for clues to her identity and the identity of her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Haunting Vision
programme.desc: A woman who survived a deadly childhood fire sends police a letter charging that her father killed her mother 30 years ago.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Shot in the Dark
programme.desc: A woman is found dead of a gunshot wound and police conclude that she was murdered by her husband. Forensic scientists were able to piece together the clues and determine what really happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Postal Mortem
programme.desc: On October 15, 1985, two bombs rocked Salt Lake City and resulted in two deaths. A third explosion occurred the next day, but this time the victim survived. Police believed that the survivor is more than an innocent by-stander.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Woman Scorned
programme.desc: When a young mother and her infant son are found dead in a cornfield, the obvious suspect is the husband and father of the victims. But some insects found on the bodies reveal a vital clue, as does a long, blonde hair found on the victims.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Buried Secrets
programme.desc: A fire leads investigators to re-examine an unusual death.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: On the Rocks
programme.desc: The naked body of a young woman is discovered in a remote area leading forensic investigators on a search for clues to her identity and the identity of her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: As Fault
programme.desc: A young mother goes missing after a night out. Police suspect foul play and begin looking into the woman's strained family life for answers. When the case goes from missing persons to homicide, a man claims an accident was to blame.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Family Ties
programme.desc: An esteemed couple is brutally attacked in their home, leaving one dead and the other gravely injured. The survivor identifies the killer but recants her admission leaving investigators probing for answers. A DNA hit captures the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Trouble Brewing
programme.desc: A high-priced call girl is murdered on the outskirts of Columbia, SC, and find that a six-pack of beer may be their only link to the person responsible.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Holy Terror
programme.desc: When churches are bombed in a community in Illinois, the people responsible are quickly apprehended. But the bombings somehow continue, leading to this explosive investigation to be reopened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Needle in a Haystack
programme.desc: There was no apparent reason for the young, healthy college student to be dead. But when the medical examiner found the tiniest of clues during the autopsy, investigators were able to unravel the mystery of betrayal and revenge.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Room With a View
programme.desc: The victim had been stabbed more than a hundred times and her bedroom was soaked with blood. While her body was positioned in a suggestive way, she hadn't been sexually assaulted.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Buried Secrets
programme.desc: A fire leads investigators to re-examine an unusual death.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: On the Rocks
programme.desc: The naked body of a young woman is discovered in a remote area leading forensic investigators on a search for clues to her identity and the identity of her killer.

programme.desc: The Amazon rainforest pushed All-star survivalist Ky to the edge with swarms of mosquitos, blood-thirsty piranhas, and aggressive pumas. Hunger and desperation lead to a risky night hunt in caiman-filled waters.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Thieves in the Night
programme.desc: One survivalist falls into a roaring fire after weeks of depleted energy due to no food. With just days to go, the pair makes a daring plan to survive.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Twinning
programme.desc: In an unprecedented Naked and Afraid challenge, identical twin sisters Amber and Serena, as well as brothers Warren and Thomas, are dropped in the African savannah. They take on rhinos, hyenas and a territorial leopard stalking their camp.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Survive or Ky Tryin
programme.desc: The Amazon rainforest pushed All-star survivalist Ky to the edge with swarms of mosquitos, blood-thirsty piranhas, and aggressive pumas. Hunger and desperation lead to a risky night hunt in caiman-filled waters.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Ashes to Ashes
programme.desc: A survival instructor and retiree of the armed forces are inserted into the volcano-ravaged island of Montserrat. With completely different survival styles, they find a way to work together, but one accident single-handedly has an eruptive effect on both.

programme.title: Vegas Rat Rods: Electro Rod
programme.desc: When a client brings Steve a 1928 Buick filled with rotten wood, his excitement at rat-rodding an original 'gangster' car soon fades when he learns his client wants it to be an electric car.

programme.title: Vegas Rat Rods: Mack Rod
programme.desc: Guns and gators are on the menu when a Texan house mover brings Steve his family treasure: a 1938 Big Rig Mack Truck cab that's one step from the grave.

programme.title: Vegas Rat Rods: Stampede Rod
programme.desc: A 1931 Model A Ford golden gem from another era gets the rat rod overhaul: a Cummins 4BT diesel engine, cool cowboy bling on the interior and a kickass paintjob that would make Henry Ford blush.

programme.title: Vegas Rat Rods: Viva Las Vegas!
programme.desc: The Welderup boys build a tribute to Vegas with a speedster for a flashy client keen on cruising the Strip. Steve hunts down rare casino memorabilia to incorporate into the build including slot machine parts and poker chips.

programme.title: Vegas Rat Rods: Battle of the Model B
programme.desc: It's Rat Rods versus Hot Rods as Steve Darnell battles the car legends of Vegas. Steve rats out a beloved 1932 Model B for an old school client and turns this classic beauty into a roadworthy beast under the suspicious glare of the hotrod clan.

programme.title: Vegas Rat Rods: Franken Rod
programme.desc: The Welderup crew turns a Chevy C10 into a true monster with rivets, scars, and a badass Cummins diesel engine.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Frankensteined Ford

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Amazing Impala
programme.desc: The crew dig out a '64 Impala that's been buried for 10 years and bring it back to life. Sparks fly between a former firefighter and a 1951 Bruco Fire Truck.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Ferrari Fix, Part 2/ 1917 REO
programme.desc: The crew pushes to finish the Ferrari F40 and get it sold. Costs rise when the $8000 windshield gets broken. Richard's luck turns when the 1967 Porsche 911S he buys turns out to be something better. Tom better get crankin' on a 1917 REO or he'll be fired.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Ford Galaxie, Part II/ Nash Healey

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Ramshackle Rambler

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Bad Ass Bronco

programme.desc: Sometimes it's not what you're cooking but how you're cooking it. Outside San Antonio, Guy Fieri checks in on the O.G. Triple D, and she's blowin' his mind with her new fried food.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: From The Sea
programme.desc: Guy Fieri heads back to see what the Triple D Nation is cookin' up from under the sea. For starters, an oyster shuckin' shack is putting a new spin on an old favorite in the Big Easy.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Coastal Cuisine
programme.desc: The sun is out and the surf is high as Guy Fieri hits up some ultimate DDD spots by the shore. First, he's in Honolulu to say 'Hi' to an old buddy who's reelin' in fresh poke and smokin' pork by the plateful.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: A Family Affair
programme.desc: Guy is heading out to check in on family-run favorites. In Honolulu, a set of siblings are ready to roll their mom's Filipino food all around the island. Then, in San Diego, a taquaria has been serving taquitos the same way for three generations.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Guy's Going Home
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri's hittin' up some of his favourite hometown haunts. First, he pops into a Mexican joint right in his Santa Rosa, Calif., 'hood, where he chows on the pozole every time he's off the road.

programme.title: Worst Cooks in America: Incognito Cuisine
programme.desc: The recruits enter the world of clandestine cuisine and play a game where they answer seafood trivia in order to reveal a picture puzzle. Then Alton Brown and Anne Burrell teach them how to make empanadas for their skill drill challenge.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: The Queen Is In
programme.desc: The queen of food, Martha Stewart, graces the kitchen along with her pal, Chef Richard Blais. They hold court with talented chefs Katherine Fuchs and Michael Merida to make Bobby Flay look like the court jester.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: The Lady Butchers
programme.desc: Meat enthusiast Courtney Rada and Iron Chef Michael Symon source Cleveland chefs Penny Barend and Melissa Khoury to bring Bobby Flay down. These lady butchers are ready to slice and dice the competition.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Off to the Races
programme.desc: Chef Josh Capon and sports reporter Carolyn Manno team up to make sure Bobby Flay doesn't try for a trick play. Haitian chef Jouvens Jean takes on Francophile and Seattle restaurateur Bruce Naftaly to beat Bobby at his own game.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Fey vs. Flay
programme.desc: Iron Chef Alex Guarnaschelli shows Bobby Flay no mercy with fellow mean girl, the hilarious and talented actress Tina Fey. They bring in two more mean girls, celebrity chef Alexcia Smith and former stuntwoman-turned-chef Asia Mei.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Dolphin Doctor
programme.desc: Polka, a bottlenose dolphin, has a raspy voice and needs to see the doctor to get the all-clear. Staff excitedly prepare for the upcoming puffin breeding season. Two woebegone sharks are due for a checkup. A curious and active box turtle goes for a walk.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Ready for the Jelly
programme.desc: A sweet beluga whale trains with staff to go on the 'whale scale.' Blacktip reef shark L2 is not eating normally and staff work to figure out why. See the first sea lion born at the aquarium.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Big Is Beautiful
programme.desc: After eating all his tank mate’s food, Tank the hungry sea turtle finds a space to eat in peace. Two beluga whales are welcomed to their new home at the aquarium, and Scarlett the lovable sea lion turns two.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Sea Otter Summer Camp
programme.desc: The team is determined to have Gibson the sea otter pup discover his independence as he separates from his pal, Mara. The African penguins head off-site for spring cleaning, and Thor the moray eel proves he's the ultimate escape artist.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Bacon and Tomato's Big Adventure
programme.desc: The staff becomes concerned when Jupiter, the rescued sea lion is not himself. The Ocean Voyager exhibit awaits its new residents: black-blotched Fantail stingray siblings, Bacon and Tomato, and Shelley the shy box turtle makes friends.

programme.title: Coyote Peterson: Brave the Wild: Swarmed by Killer Bees
programme.desc: Coyote Peterson's dangerous past encounter with honey bees has lead him to join forces with bee conservationist, Chris Brinton. A stunt involving Peterson and 10,000 bees dispels misconceptions and reveals their passive nature.

programme.title: Coyote Peterson: Brave the Wild: Dinner with a Devil
programme.desc: Coyote heads to Australia's Devil Ark conservatory and reveals the history behind the critically endangered Tasmanian devil. As he is exposed to their habitat and routine, he discovers the manpower needed to conserve this species.

programme.title: Coyote Peterson: Brave the Wild: Realm of the Caiman
programme.desc: Coyote Peterson heads to Brazil to encounter the Yacare Caiman. As he swims alongside them in piranha-infested waterways, he studies their perfect-predator personality as jaguars and capybara lurk from the shoreline.

programme.title: Coyote Peterson: Brave the Wild: Shadow of the Jaguar
programme.desc: Coyote demonstrates how capturing elusive big cats on film is a near-impossible task, but with technological advancements such as trail cameras, nature enthusiasts can see predators like jaguars up close in their natural habitat.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Robert's Python Swim
programme.desc: Robert gets in the water with Gloria, a 12-foot reticulated python, to swim alongside her for the first time in the Crocoseum. Bindi welcomes home two orphaned kangaroo joeys, while Terri helps release a rescued wedge-tailed eagle back into the wild.

programme.title: Too Cute!: Puppies and Ducklings
programme.desc: Three adorable litters of puppies come of age. The first few months of these Pugs, Mini-Australian Shepherds and Rottweillers' lives will be filled with adventure, including an introduction to the agility course and a lesson in duck-herding.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Fluffy's Last Stand
programme.desc: A mother and daughter are being torn apart by their cat, Missy, who's determined to kill their other cat Fluffy. Jackson meets a tortie named Candy, who's beating up a nine-year-old because she isn't so sweet.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: Tiny Soul Mate
programme.desc: Dr. Jeff and Hector help 40 miniature Australian shepherds rescued from a puppy mill. Vet tech Christine turns to Dr. Jeff when her elderly Chihuahua has trouble walking. And Dr. Jeff is called out to treat an alpaca with a serious infection.

programme.title: The Vet Life: Bait n' Switch
programme.desc: Dr. Ross becomes a human jungle gym when six sugar gliders show off their best moves. Zorro, a one-year-old Chihuahua-mix shocks Dr. Lavigne with heart trouble not typically seen in a young dog. The doctors hit the bay on a fishing trip with a client.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Giraffe Road Trip
programme.desc: The family prepares Croc One, Steve Irwin's research ship, for a mission to release an endangered sea turtle back to the wild. Scarlett the Giraffe is reunited with her grandmother, and Grub the wild Echidna is released from the Zoo's Wildlife Hospital.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: The Trials of Parenting
programme.desc: Baby flamingo Marley's mom has lost interest in mothering duties leaving dad, Rum, to rear the baby alone. Parenting duties are normally shared equally by flamingo parents, but Rum will have to do the work of two parents if his son is going to endure.

programme.title: The Zoo: Bears Will Be Bears
programme.desc: The brown bears keep tearing up their exhibit, leaving zoo staff scrambling for a solution. Armani the aardvark gets treated for a tooth infection which has dampened her enthusiasm for digging. And, a group of burrowing owls prepare to move.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Rising Tide

programme.desc: Five US Navy planes vanish without a trace in the Bermuda Triangle, fueling speculation that this strange stretch of water is cursed. Using the latest science and tech, a team of experts investigate why the planes disappeared and where they are today.

programme.desc: A strange complex of buildings on a remote tropical island was once home to a large seaside community, but today, locals avoid the area and claim that it's haunted. New discoveries reveal why this eerie place was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Night of the Chupacabra
programme.desc: A camera captures footage of a Chupacabra-like beast. At an observatory on Hawaii's Mauna Kea, cameras record a mysterious explosion that looks like a nuclear bomb detonated in space. Video of spontaneous combustion is taken at a haunted bar.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Doomsday Swamp
programme.desc: A high-speed police chase ends when the fugitive makes an impossible getaway. Deep in Louisiana, a swamp devours 100-foot trees, and experts worry that a nearby town could be next. Three cars are recorded mysteriously levitating at a busy intersection.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Curse of Osiris
programme.desc: A camera captures a person inexplicably bursting into flames. An ancient statue at a museum appears to come to life at night. An alien-like creature is filmed in the sewers. Eerie lights caught on camera may explain a mysterious death.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Monster of the Deep
programme.desc: Strange footage captures a mystifying monster from the deep, baffling marine biologists. Bizarre ghost lights haunt North Carolina mountains for centuries. When a giant explosion is caught on tape in New Mexico, investigators fear the US is under attack.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Curse of the Mayan Treasure
programme.desc: An explorer searching for treasure at a Mayan sacrificial site is attacked by a mysterious underwater fog. Thousands of fish spontaneously jump to their deaths. Something alien appears over the skies of Lost Angeles.

programme.title: The Planets and Beyond: Ends of the Solar System: Strange Frontiers
programme.desc: Astronaut Mike Massimino uses the latest NASA discoveries to explore the dark and mysterious frontiers of our solar system.

programme.title: The Planets: Mars: The Definitive Guide
programme.desc: Astronaut Mike Massimino reveals the answers to some of the greatest mysteries on the Red Planet. Using the most detailed survey of Mars ever created, he discovers the dark history of our closest neighbor.

programme.title: The Planets and Beyond: Dwarf Planets: Aliens Among Us
programme.desc: Astronaut Mike Massimino explores dwarf planets of our solar system, mysterious worlds like Pluto that are too small to be a planet, but are home to some of the universe's biggest secrets.

programme.title: The Planets and Beyond: Alien Moons: The Next Earth
programme.desc: Astronaut Mike Massimino journeys to the alien moons of our solar system, and discovers if these strange worlds could be habitable for life beyond earth.

programme.title: The Planets and Beyond: Milky Way: The Monster Inside
programme.desc: Astronaut Mike Massimino explores the dark secret of the Milky Way, the home of both Earth and a terrifying supermassive black hole.

programme.title: The Planets and Beyond: Alien Oceans: Search for Life
programme.desc: Astronaut Mike Massimino explores the mysterious oceans of our solar system, where the latest discoveries provide new clues in the search for alien life.

programme.title: The Planets and Beyond: Mercury: The Cursed Planet
programme.desc: Astronaut Mike Massimino explores Mercury, a deadly and tiny planet that faces constant attacks from the Sun, and which might one day pose a threat to all life on Earth.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: It's the Brick Bandit!
programme.desc: The Task Force chases the 'Brick bandit' who leaves bricks in the car he steals. An officer has to take down a suspect by himself during a tense night.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: Nothing Good Happens After Midnight
programme.desc: The Task force realizes that finding cars are not their only job. They take down robbers, and then search for a man with a gun.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: Saturday Night
programme.desc: A deliveryman has his car stolen at gunpoint, and the unit uses a decoy vehicle to try to catch the suspects. The Unit changes their schedule to catch the thieves off guard.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: These Are the Streets
programme.desc: Stolen jeep followed; individuals are captured and a gun is recovered.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Moving Target
programme.desc: Deputy Mendez and the Fugitive Task Force search for a career criminal before another victim is robbed, assaulted, or worse.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Chasing a Ghost
programme.desc: Investigators search for a murder suspect in the towns and mountainsides of Puerto Rico, which proves to be a nightmare.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: The Ex
programme.desc: A fugitive who was deported several years ago for brutally assaulting his ex-wife has returned to the country and could be looking for her.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Last Dance
programme.desc: Two armed and masked intruders barge into a family home demanding money, and threaten to kill the children. The police search for one of the suspects - an exotic dancer.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: I Just Wanted My Burger
programme.desc: The A.T.T.F. is on the prowl in Newark, New Jersey and they have plenty to keep them busy. First they get a work out when a perp takes off running, later they recover a stolen tractor trailer and a stolen car at a drive-thru window.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: Fastest Feet in the Fleet
programme.desc: The Unit has their busiest night; a break is taken to see who is the fastest in the unit.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: Devil on One Shoulder
programme.desc: The task force finds the streets of Newark busier than ever during a rainstorm. An unexpected surprise forces the unit into pursuit. A crazy driver puts the unit's wet-weather skills to the test.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: It's Job Security
programme.desc: Task force patrols the streets at night incognito to track down unsuspecting thieves.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Hot and Cold
programme.desc: Officers nab a parole violator who raped a nine-year old and search for a fugitive wanted for violating parole on a manslaughter conviction.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Gun Store Heist
programme.desc: In Virginia Beach, Virginia, almost 30 handguns were stolen after thieves broke through the roof of a gun store. Detectives try to secure the firearms before the thieves have time to sell the guns on the streets.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: On the Stroll
programme.desc: Task Force is looking for a woman promoting prostitution of young children.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Predator Pursuit
programme.desc: A twice convicted and particularly dangerous pedophile and sexual predator from Georgia is pursued before he hurts someone again.

programme.title: American Justice: Kidnapped
programme.desc: Filmmakers study the effectiveness of law enforcement in apprehending kidnappers.

programme.title: American Justice: Death of a Bride
programme.desc: In September 1999, a New Jersey woman is murdered by her ex-boyfriend on her wedding day.

programme.title: Nightwatch: New Beginnings
programme.desc: The team celebrates the opening of its new headquarters, finally complete after 10 years of working out of trailers. The new team, Arcady and Ted, get to know each other's styles in their first shifts together.

programme.title: Nightwatch: Stranger Things
programme.desc: A woman tells officers her boyfriend once brought her back to life after she was murdered. A purse snatching suspect stops running to eat some chicken strips, and a tarot card reader gets dehydrated.

programme.title: Kansas City SWAT
programme.desc: Officer Tim Davis' morning run is interrupted by a barricaded gunman who has taken two women hostages, his sister and his girlfriend. Then the already nerve-racking domestic dispute grows even more tense when gunshots ring out inside the home.

programme.title: Kansas City SWAT
programme.desc: Charles 'Chip' Huth and Kansas City SWAT head out on a high-stakes drug-warrant. The team will make simultaneous hits on two locations in the same apartment complex.

programme.title: Kansas City SWAT
programme.desc: It's a tense situation as Sgt. Paul Hamilton and his squad get caught up in a high-speed car chase to bring down a suspected auto theft ring. Later, Paul's squad joins Huth's to double their efforts and hit two houses at once.

programme.title: Dallas SWAT
programme.desc: Memorial Day weekend erupts when SWAT is called in to subdue a home intruder, whose startling method of entry leaves the team scratching their heads. An alleged heroin dealer is scoped out by an officer who's on a mission to put him out of business.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Demon in His Eyes
programme.desc: As children, Betty and Ulayla adored their little brother, Johnny, and tried to protect him. As they got older, Johnny did strange things, but they never believed he was capable of pure evil until he confessed a horrible secret.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: I Wish I'd Turned Around
programme.desc: Kat Harris and Marla Kreuger each loved Lawrence Harris in her own way. Each dismissed his dark obsession as childish and strange, but harmless. Neither of them realized he was preparing to sacrifice innocent lives for his evil purpose.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Poisoned by Love
programme.desc: Norma Hawkins grew up in fear of her mother, Shirley Allen. For years, Norma watched in horror while Shirley's anger destroyed those closest to her. But when people started dying, Norma had to find the courage to turn in her own mother to police.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Our Secret Identity
programme.desc: As a child, Pam Jacobs spent years of her life on the run from the law. But she had no idea that her father, Charles Sinclair, was a wanted man until the day the FBI caught up with them.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: I Raised a Sociopath
programme.desc: On the day Robert Foust contemplated killing his own son, Aaron, he saw it as the only way to prevent Aaron from becoming a murderer. But instead, Robert chose to put himself and his son in God's hands. And God's plan would make him question everything.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: I Should Have Killed Him Myself
programme.desc: John Duck spent his entire life fearing the day his brother, Kevin, would finally kill someone. When he discovered his brother was actually a murderer, he still wasn't ready to face the truth he had always known: that his brother had been born a killer.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: Unholy Communion
programme.desc: A devoted fiancé makes a devastating discovery: his beloved partner Anne Boncella and her 8-year-old daughter have been brutally murdered. The ensuing investigation will unravel shocking secrets that have lain dormant in their seemingly peaceful hometown.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Face of My Torturer
programme.desc: William Knorr's mother, Theresa, always threatened that if she ever went to jail for what she had done, she would take him down with her. After years spent helping her keep the horrors secret, could he ever escape or would he wind up like all the others?

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: I Should Have Killed Him Myself
programme.desc: John Duck spent his entire life fearing the day his brother, Kevin, would finally kill someone. When he discovered his brother was actually a murderer, he still wasn't ready to face the truth he had always known: that his brother had been born a killer.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: Garden of Evil
programme.desc: A landscaper that has an obsession for his client won't take no for an answer.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: Unlucky Seven
programme.desc: Heather, a grocery store barista, has just began dating her most recent hire, Arturo. But as time goes by, Arturo is unable to hide his dark side. His obsession with Heather comes at the expense of their relationship, his job - and her life.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: Going Postal
programme.desc: When US postal worker Kim accepts a ride to the Orange County fair from a quiet co-worker, she has no idea that she will become the center of a terrifying campaign of stalking, harassment, and obsession.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: Just a Wall Away
programme.desc: When writer Amy Neisis finds her dream apartment everything is set for a bright future. It's within her budget and she moves quickly to secure a sale. But four nights after moving a terrifying scream makes her realise she got more than she bargained for.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: Paging Sarah
programme.desc: Nineteen-year-old single mother Sarah moves to Vegas and quickly lands a manager's position at a local gas station. When her colleague's body is discovered raped and murdered and violent messages start playing on her beeper, Sarah could be next.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: My Son Is Not a Monster
programme.desc: An 11-year-old's soon-to be step-mom is found murdered in their home. A child-sized shotgun, gun residue on his clothes, and a witness account all seem to point to the boy as the shooter.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Rear Window
programme.desc: The murder of a young boy rocks a small town and he might have been a victim of jealous rage, caught in the crosshairs of a love affair gone wrong.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: What the Dash Cam Never Saw
programme.desc: It is a story that made national headlines: a young Oklahoma City police officer accused of preying on women in the very community he was sworn to serve and protect.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Ditched and Desperate
programme.desc: Breaking up is never easy but it can be murder.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Cling 'Til Death
programme.desc: These Deadly Women won't let their men go.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Mid Life Murder
programme.desc: These Deadly Women didn't grow old gracefully; they committed 'Mid-Life Murder.'

programme.title: Deadly Women: Without Mercy
programme.desc: Every murder is a tragedy but some are unthinkable.

programme.title: 9/11: As We Watched
programme.desc: The story of that day through the unflinching eye of ABC News, as the network's anchors and reporters rushed to the scenes of chaos and embarked on what would become an extraordinary 83 hours of live coverage.

programme.title: Capturing Bin Laden
programme.desc: Capturing bin Laden tracks the rise and fall of Osama bin Laden, a man who spent the decade following the September 11 attacks at the top of America's most wanted list.

programme.title: 9/11: The Falling Man: 9/11: The Falling Man
programme.desc: The story of the unforgettable photograph of a 9/11 'jumper.' It follows the trail of the photographer who nearly lost his life shooting the image and a journalist who committed himself to uncovering the falling man's identity.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: In 1941, Hitler has thrown himself into a fight to the death against Stalin. Two decades earlier, in 1917, Joseph Jughashvili from Georgia is a member of Lenin's Bolshevik Party, who has just seized power in Russia. The country is torn by civil war.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: After blocking the Germans right outside of Moscow, Stalin now faces Hitler's second assault. The world's fate will be decided in Stalingrad. Like in Leningrad, men, women, and children are plunged into hell and sacrificed.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: The Soviets continue on the path to towards liberation. On the road to Berlin, they discover the horror of Hitler's extermination camps. Fifteen years earlier, Stalin transformed his country using every means at his disposal.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Hitler: The Menace
programme.desc: See how Hitler succeeded in conquering Germany. Nothing predestines this mediocre student and failed artist to become dictator of Germany the Führer.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Hitler: The Fuhrer
programme.desc: 1929. Germany, harshly affected by the worldwide economic crisis, is sinking into despair. Bloody street fighting between Nazis and Communists is raging. Fear of the 'Red peril' will push millions of voters into Hitler's arms. Democracy is at risk.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Secret Prisons
programme.desc: The dark history of America's Secret Prisons is revealed.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Civil War
programme.desc: From a secret society that gathers in the dead of night and plots the assassination of Abraham Lincoln, to U.S. spymaster Alan Pinkerton who stops Confederate agents, the outcome of the Civil War is often decided by spies.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: The Industry of War
programme.desc: Hitler is determined to rebuild Germany's military strength after the destruction of almost all its weaponry in the First World War. To overcome his country's dire shortage of raw materials, he plans to steal them from other countries.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: A Culture of Control
programme.desc: Hitler is determined to change the way German people think and feel by creating a new, Nazi form of art and culture. He takes over the film industry and radio stations, giving the Nazis complete control over every image and message his people receive.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Retreat from Reality
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler is determined to fight to the very end, even if it costs millions of Germans their lives. He puts his faith in his the 'Wunderwaffe' and the 'wonder weapons,' including the first ever ballistic missile, the V2.

programme.title: Wartime Crime: The Nazi Jewel Heist
programme.desc: When the U.S. military takes over the German Kronberg Castle in 1945, a scandalous affair between a U.S. Army Captain and Air Force Officer ensues, resulting in one of the most elaborate treasure heists of all time.

programme.title: Wartime Crime: The Sicilian Connection
programme.desc: Incensed by their treatment under Mussolini's regime and anxious to re-establish their European criminal network, a number of mafioso, including incarcerated kingpin Charles 'Lucky' Luciano, offered their full support to American intelligence officers.

programme.title: Wartime Crime: The Blackout Killers
programme.desc: Two serial killers take advantage of the blackouts in Nazi Germany and Britain that were meant to defend against enemy bombing.

programme.title: Against the Odds: A Chance in Hell: The Battle of Ramadi
programme.desc: When Colonel McFarland arrived in Iraq, Al-Qaeda had already declared Ramadi the capital of a new caliphate. The soldiers of McFarland's Ready First Combat Team fight to give American a victory.

programme.title: Against the Odds: Those Damned Engineers
programme.desc: In December of 1944, the seemingly defeated Germans secretly mustered 600,000 battle-hardened troops, including whole SS Panzer Divisions, into an all out offensive to capture Antwerp, the heart of the Allied supply chain.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Stable Family Ties
programme.desc: Chase and the crew have their work cut out for them turning a vacation cabin that was originally a 1920s horse barn into a stable building for a large family. The crew draw on the past as inspiration and want to honour the owners' late parents.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Past, Present and Future
programme.desc: A couple's Belle Island camp has a long multi-generational history within their family spanning nearly 100 years. Their camp is an ongoing focus of family life and they are now ready to make its preservation their main priority.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Golden Years Family Camp
programme.desc: After buying her parents' old summer camp in Bridgton, a mother calls on the crew to help her completely renovate the home for her parents to retire in full-time. With a $40,000 budget and an open time line, the crew transform it into a retirement space.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Morrill Family Bunkhouse
programme.desc: Chase Morrill and his team of builders take on the old army barracks on their family camp that has served as overflow sleeping for over 40 years.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Overload

programme.title: Building Alaska: I Need Five Hands
programme.desc: Paige and Cody's build takes a hit after Sterling and Joe leave the site and a trailer full of vital materials breaks down. The foundation is sinking at Mike and Teresa's cabin while Kathleen and Mike Kondus watch part of their cabin begin to crumble.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Mountain Man Cave
programme.desc: Joe Donovan, an avid skier and adventurer, has found the perfect spot for his permanent base camp on a remote ridge in southwest Montana. Follow the adventure as he battles the elements to build his rustic, straw bale, dream cabin.

programme.desc: An eco-friendly couple fights an early winter to build a timber and straw-bale cabin in Maine.

programme.desc: Brett restores a Victorian Bungalow for a military veteran and his daughter. The project grows in scale when unexpected problems are discovered and it becomes a complete restoration.

programme.title: Restored: 1915 Arts And Crafts
programme.desc: Brett Waterman gets the chance to restore an enormous Arts and Crafts home with six bedrooms for a family that grew from four children to eight children in just two years.

programme.title: Restored: 1930s Colorful Spanish Colonial Farmhouse
programme.desc: Brett restores a 1930s two-story Spanish Colonial farmhouse in Fontana, California. He learns the rich history of the home which then guides his design plan for the house exterior, entryway, living room and kitchen.

programme.title: Restored: 1905 Queen Anne Victorian Restoration
programme.desc: One of Brett's old high school friends asks him to help restore her 1905 Queen Anne Victorian bungalow. She has many unfinished renovation projects but wants to finish them. She also wants to convert a bedroom into the office it was designed to be.

programme.title: Restored: 1901 Neoclassical Victorian
programme.desc: Brett helps an engaged couple restore their Victorian home, including a new kitchen and bathroom before their big wedding day. Brett begins work on the kitchen, removing additions and wallpaper.

programme.title: Restored: 1918 Arts and Crafts Bungalow
programme.desc: Brett Waterman helps a young family with two small children restore their home after a failed attempt to restore it themselves. The house has been in the family for generations so Brett's eye for historical accuracy is much needed.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: Dream House
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley stumble upon a pre-1900s Victorian after some curbside dumpster diving. They hit New Orleans for some perfect vintage decor then return to combine two rooms into one spacious kitchen and make this the dream house worth of the name.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: 1913 Beach Bungalow Restoration
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley find a rundown 1913 beach bungalow that's about to be demolished. They transform the small kitchen into a modern, open-concept space with vintage touches and restore the original hardwood floors and shiplap walls.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: Tiny Craftsman
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley revisit a house they tried to purchase a year ago and find the small 1920s craftsman has been stripped of all its original features.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: Comedy Cupcakes
programme.desc: Four bakers are going to have to bring the funny -- and the tasty -- if they want to be front and centre at a celebrity packed VIP party for Variety magazine's Power of Comedy.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Calgary Stampede
programme.desc: At the Calgary Stampede, Noah Cappe indulges in a slice of pizza loaded with edible insects.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Livestock to Lemons
programme.desc: Noah Cappe gets a lesson in the meat that makes Texas famous, sampling the Texas chili burger and the big Texas barbecue baked potato. Then he tries a local legend's tamale recipe before rounding off the day with strawberry waffle bombs.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Renaissance to Rio Grande
programme.desc: Young squire Noah Cappe tries his hand at making the King's Court Conch fritters, decadent deep fried peanut butter and jelly brownie bites, a picquant fried green tomato BLT and the cookies and cream sandwich.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Derby Day to Down State
programme.desc: In Louisville Kentucky at the Kentucky Derby Festival, custom made pizza. Later, it's time to get a little bit country with Ozark style loaded fries, piled high with pork.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Steak Out
programme.desc: Noah Cappe is in carnivore mode for the San Angelo Stock Show and Rodeo in Texas.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Toastbusters
programme.desc: Noah Cappe hits the Hunt County Fair in Greenville, Texas, and makes short work of the Smoke Bomb and the French toast crunch burger. But it's the blue bacon cheesecake that really knocks him out.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Mississippi Delta
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores the iconic soul food of the Mississippi Delta. From fried catfish and hushpuppies to smothered oxtails and decadent mud pie, the Deep South's down-home dishes soothe the soul.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Chiang Mai
programme.desc: Andrew reveals the most iconic foods of Chiang Mai, Thailand. From coconut curry soup to a signature sausage with pork and chile paste, fish roasted in banana leaves to minced pork salad, the northern city has a regional cuisine unlike any other.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Detroit
programme.desc: With a menu that includes everything from iconic soul food like short ribs and ox tails, to a restaurant serving up lamb brain sandwiches in the heart of Arab America, to a local man known for his longstanding muskrat recipe.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Seattle
programme.desc: Andrew visits Seattle where the food scene is a contrast of high tech sophistication and rugged simplicity.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Howdy, Texas!
programme.desc: Chefs are kicking up the creativity with their big and bold flavours at these hot spots across the Lone Star state, from an Austin beer garden serving up the best of the wurst to sizzling fajitas topped with garlic butter at a Houston Tex-Mex joint.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Street Eats
programme.desc: Diners get down and dirty with the best street food in the country, from chicken wings that defy crispiness and pizza-topped burgers to fiery hot shrimp and fresh-from-the-sea salmon tacos.

programme.title: Tia Mowry at Home: Awards Show Party

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Say Cheese
programme.desc: Chef Bobby Flay knows that cheese makes everything better, and brunch is no exception. He serves up some cheese-filled dishes like Meyer lemon ricotta crepes with candied almonds, a frittata with thyme roasted potatoes, smoked mozzarella and tomato-basil.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Retro Revamp Brunch
programme.desc: Bobby gives tried-and-true brunch staples a modern makeover with simple techniques and everyday ingredients.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Weekend Staycation
programme.desc: A weekend staycation brunch at Chef Bobby Flay's home! Bobby's kitchen is the destination for a cozy menu of crunchy maple topped oatmeal, avocado salmon benedict, cinnamon sugar mini pancake muffins.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Chocoholic Brunch
programme.desc: Chef Bobby Flay is covering the kitchen in chocolate for a luscious menu of sweet and savory treats like dark chocolate waffles with white chocolate custard sauce and espresso-chocolate whipped cream.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Super Chefs' Favorite Foods

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Sweet and Savory

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Smoked, Stuffed and Smothered
programme.desc: In San Diego, Michael Symon devours a delicious dumpling-inspired pork and shrimp burger and an elevated pub food classic. In Shreveport, La., a wood-fired pizza is topped with spicy roast chicken and sweet corn.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Scary Good Smoked Meat
programme.desc: In San Diego, Michael Symon chows down on fish tacos with housemade blue corn tortillas and a meaty Mexican pizza. In Denver, a local Colorado lamb patty is a remake of a traditional Hawaiian hangover cure, the Loco Moco.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: The Northern Frights/ Don't Fear the Realtor
programme.desc: Uncle Gene's been invited to a performance of the Northern Frights! Maggie the ghostwriter is back and wants to sell Hotel Transylvania.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Impossible Summit of Mt. Neverrest!
programme.desc: Scrooge and Huey are determined to be the first to set foot atop an impossible summit, but the mountain holds a treacherous secret which had them test both their commitment and survival.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Town Where Everyone Was Nice!
programme.desc: Donald reunites with his band, The Three Caballeros, while the family takes in the sites of a Brazilian town with a dark secret.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Parker Gets Toasty
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Hey Now, You're a Brawl Star
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Dangerous Chemistry of Gandra Dee!
programme.desc: With Huey and Webby’s help, Fenton woos a punk rock scientist, only to uncover her dangerous plans for Gizmoduck.

programme.title: Marvel's Avengers: Secret Wars: Avengers No More Part One
programme.desc: While trying to rescue Tony Stark from another dimension, the Avengers battle the Leader and his newly formed Cabal.

programme.title: Marvel's Avengers: Secret Wars: Avengers No More Part Two
programme.desc: Black Panther assembles a new team of Avengers to stop the Leader and free the original Avengers.

programme.title: Marvel's Avengers: Secret Wars: Sneakers
programme.desc: With the help of a new team, the Avengers must reunite to save the universe.

programme.title: Marvel's Avengers: Secret Wars: The Most Dangerous Hunt
programme.desc: In the Asgardian wilderness, Black Panther and Hulk find themselves chained together and on the run from Skurge.

programme.title: Marvel's Avengers: Secret Wars: The Eye of Agamotto: Part One
programme.desc: With the help of a new team, the Avengers must reunite to save the universe.

programme.title: Marvel's Avengers: Secret Wars: The Eye of Agamotto: Part Two
programme.desc: With the help of a new team, the Avengers must reunite to save the universe.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Big Bugball Game/ Combat Camp
programme.desc: Anne must learn the value of teamwork to win the town’s annual Bugball game.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Cheers for Fears /Just Our Luck
programme.desc: When Candace is stumped about what to get Jeremy for his birthday, she reluctantly decides to ask Phineas and Ferb for their help in creating a ride of Jeremy’s life.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: She's the Mayor/ The Lemonade Stand
programme.desc: While Candace and Stacy's relationship is put to the test, Phineas and Ferb build the ultimate lemonade stand and begin to offer franchise opportunities. Candace is awarded the opportunity to be mayor for the day, which she uses to her advantage.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Invasion of the Ferb Snatchers/ Ain't No Kiddie Ride
programme.desc: After an all night science-fiction movie marathon, Candace is convinced that Ferb is an alien and gathers evidence to prove it. The boys admit that they are doing something for an alien but that Ferb is not one.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Bully Bust/ Backyard Hodge Podge
programme.desc: Candace challenges Buford to keep the boys' invention from disappearing.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Thanks But No Thanks/ Troy Story
programme.desc: Inspired by Candace’s book club selection, the boys decide to reenact the Trojan War from “The Illiad,” but with a Phineas and Ferb twist.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Ask a Foolish Question/ Misperceived Monotreme
programme.desc: When Candace discovers that Phineas and Ferb have invented a computer that can answer anything, she asks it how she can finally bust her brothers. Then, Perry misses his 100th battle against Doofenshmirtz to go to a charity pet wash with Candace.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: I Was a Middle Aged Robot/ Suddenly Suzy
programme.desc: Candace is determined to win this year's father-daughter obstacle course, but unfortunately, Lawrence finds Agent P's lair and his memory is accidentally erased by a gadget.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: A Hard Day's Knight/ I, Brobot
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb put on a medieval tournament; Candace takes the role of the Black Knight.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Bad Hair Day/ Meatloaf Surprise
programme.desc: Candace gets a bad haircut and must rely on Phineas and Ferb's hair growing machine to correct it before she attends the Endangered Animal Benefit. Then, Mom joins Jamie Oliver as one of the judges for Danville's Meatloaf Festival Cook-Off.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Fly on the Wall/ My Sweet Ride
programme.desc: Buford removes a part from a tire swing the boys are building and it accidentally shoots a ray that turns Candace into a fly. Meanwhile, Doofenshmirtz is suffering from Evil Scientist’s block.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Shadow War Part I: The Night of De Spell
programme.desc: After the family falls apart, Magica preys on a vulnerable Scrooge to finally acquire his Lucky Dime.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Urban Legend/ Wishing Well
programme.desc: When Bill learns that Gramma has been purposely creating a frightening reputation around town, he throws a barbeque to befriend the neighbors. Cricket makes a wishing well to cash in on people making wishes.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Level Up/ Wild Side
programme.desc: Bill gets addicted to a farm-simulating video game. Cricket's feral wild side takes over when Bill is unable to replicate their old camping trips.

programme.title: Amphibia: Lily Pad Thai/ Plantar's Last Stand
programme.desc: Anne gets a job at Stumpy’s and goes overboard turning the diner into a Thai restaurant. After a rent increase on the food stand, Anne convinces Hop Pop to sell Plantar's Potions.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Freakerheads/ For Whom the Smell Tolls
programme.desc: Hank is obsessed with the latest fad, Freakerheads! Mavis smells like rainbows and puppy dog tails when she reaches the next level event in vampire afterlife.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Afterlifestyles of the Rich and Mavis/ The Mavysitters Club
programme.desc: Mavis and her friends put their ideas for the hotel into motion.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Internabout

programme.desc: Professor Granville becomes increasingly pushy with her suggestions for Big Hero 6 as she helps them try to figure out a mysterious series of food-related burglaries.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Spear of Selene!

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Inconveniencing

programme.title: Amphibia: Hop Luck / Stakeout

programme.title: DuckTales: The Golden Spear!

programme.title: Marvel's Spider-Man: The Road to Goblin War

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: What Do You Do?
programme.desc: Burgess and Roman tackle a dangerous smuggling operation with no means to defend themselves or call for help. Meanwhile, it's a slow day in intelligence and they are spending the day receiving taser certification.

programme.title: Modern Family: Haley's 21st Birthday
programme.desc: Haley's turning 21 and the family is taking her to a bar to celebrate. Claire really wants Haley to start seeing her as a friend rather than her uptight mom, and Mitch and Cam make the sad realization that they may not be as cool as they thought.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Day We Almost Died
programme.desc: While driving out to get breakfast, the Dunphys including Manny have a near death experience causing everyone to reevaluate their lives.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Big Guns

programme.title: WWE Raw

programme.title: Briarpatch: Terrible, Shocking Things

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Se Murio El Payaso
programme.desc: When the daughter of a notorious counterfeiter arrives in Los Angeles, Sam is sent undercover as a financier, while Callen partners with Anna to track the family's latest scheme.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Wheel of Misfortune

programme.title: Forensic Files: Constructive Critcism
programme.desc: When a man is found dead, having been stabbed 46 times, and police are stuck sifting through the DNA. After an arduous search, they find their killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The List Murders

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Dirty Deed

programme.title: Guardians of the Glades: Fear at First Bite

programme.title: Moonshiners: A Shiner's Last Stand

programme.title: Moonshiners: Prophecy Fulfilled

programme.title: Moonshiners: Adios, Mr. Still

programme.title: 60 Days In: Program In Peril

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Still Chrisley After All These Years

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Chrisleys on Campus
programme.desc: When the Chrisleys take a road trip to Nashville to tour a college campus, Todd is excited for the additional family bonding time. Savannah tries to gain independence and go out with new friends, but Todd goes to the extreme and crashes her big night out.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Nurse Todd

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Crowning Achievements

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Todd Goes Country

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Quit Your Pitchin'

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Truckin' Good Time
programme.desc: Julie bites off more than she can chew when she agrees to make desserts for a food truck event. Meanwhile, Grayson gets a lesson from Todd about what it means to be truly sorry.

programme.desc: Todd is determined to win when the Rawlings come to town to compete in local family fun day. And Chase and Savannah help Grayson prepare a pitch for his new YouTube Channel.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Bringing Up Baby

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Ready to Launch
programme.desc: The Chrisleys head to Tampa for Savannah's fashion line launch at HSN. Todd and Julie help Savannah overcome her on air jitters, and Nanny gets Chase in trouble at a casino.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Training Faye
programme.desc: Julie gets frustrated when the family use Chloe's birthday as a reason to compete against each other. Nanny Faye gets more than she bargained for when Todd insists on being her trainer.

programme.title: Hangar 1: The UFO Files: UFOs at War
programme.desc: In every instance of wars throughout history, one thing is constant, the sighting of multiple UFOs over battlefields.

programme.title: Hangar 1: The UFO Files: Extreme Close Encounters
programme.desc: Deep within MUFON are files of thousands of extraordinary, unknown UFO cases that fall into the category of high strangeness. These are the closest type of encounters on record, involving UFO sightings within a few hundred feet.

programme.title: Hangar 1: The UFO Files: American Hotspots
programme.desc: In the United States, there are certain areas that seem to attract more UFO sightings than others. Discover the common thread that makes these locations a magnet for potential activity.

programme.title: Hangar 1: The UFO Files: Presidential Encounters
programme.desc: From Truman to Obama, our modern day presidents have all had rich and controversial histories with UFOs and extraterrestrials. In fact, Eisenhower, Nixon, Carter and Reagan are each rumoured to have had personal encounters.

programme.title: Hangar 1: The UFO Files: Hunted By UFOs
programme.desc: Hangar 1 contains hundreds of MUFON case files from people who have been pursued and hunted by UFOs, some even multiple times.

programme.title: Hangar 1: The UFO Files: Shadow Government
programme.desc: Hangar 1 files suggest that there is a shadow government that operates beyond public and congressional scrutiny to conceal UFO information.

programme.title: Hangar 1: The UFO Files: Alien Technology
programme.desc: Inside Hangar 1, MUFON files trace mankind's technological boom to materials reportedly recovered from UFO crashes in the 1940s. MUFON investigates allegations of alien engineering, from the birth of the transistor in the 1950s to military UFOs.

programme.title: Hangar 1: The UFO Files: Captured Aliens
programme.desc: Shocking evidence that the government has been recovering is revealed. Not only advanced technology from crashed UFOs but alien bodies as well.

programme.title: Hangar 1: The UFO Files: Unfriendly Skies
programme.desc: Pilots spend a large amount of their time in the air, so it's not surprising when we hear of pilots reporting UFO sightings. Unfortunately, pilots have been discouraged from publicizing their experience.

programme.desc: Astronaut Mike Massismino uncovers the violent secrets of the most deadly planets outside our solar system.

programme.title: How the Universe Works

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Dark History of the Solar System
programme.desc: Our solar system hides a dark and violent past, and new discoveries reveal that Earth and the planets were formed from the destruction of strange alien worlds that came before us.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Milky Way
programme.desc: New research may now be able to answer the question that asks what built the Milky Way. In the very centre of our galaxy is an extremely large black hole that is one of the most destructive objects in the universe. This could possibly be the answer.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Death of the Milky Way
programme.desc: The Milky Way is dying, and using the latest science and discoveries, experts are investigating what's killing it.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Dark History of the Solar System
programme.desc: Our solar system hides a dark and violent past, and new discoveries reveal that Earth and the planets were formed from the destruction of strange alien worlds that came before us.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Monsters of the Milky Way
programme.desc: The center of the Milky Way is home to strange and deadly phenomena that we don't yet understand, but using the latest science, experts are revealing how the supermassive black hole our galaxy's core shapes life on Earth.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Knights Templar in America
programme.desc: Mysterious new evidence suggests the Knights Templar fled Europe and rebuilt their fearsome warrior order in the Americas a century before Columbus, and experts use cutting-edge tech to investigate if long-lost relics confirm this game-changing theory.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Killing Meriwether Lewis
programme.desc: Meriwether Lewis was the man who teamed with William Clark to map the lands west of the Mississippi, but he died in mysterious circumstances. Experts reveal a vast conspiracy that could prove that one of America's greatest explorers was murdered.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Hunt for the Ark of the Covenant
programme.desc: New clues taken from long-lost maps offer fresh leads in the hunt for the Ark of the Covenant, and using the latest hi-tech archaeological methods, experts retrace its steps through the Holy Land, Egypt, and Ethiopia to make a game-changing discovery.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Finding the Fountain of Youth
programme.desc: The legend of the Fountain of Youth might finally be explained by hidden messages encoded in a 500-year-old map, and using cutting-edge archaeological methods, experts explore forgotten caves and perilous waters to reveal this mystery's long-lost secrets.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Mystery of the American Maya
programme.desc: New evidence suggests the Maya civilization did not suddenly vanish, but that they instead still survived, they just resettled in the United States. Using cutting-edge tech, experts reveal what really happened to these long-lost people.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Egypt's Land of the Gods
programme.desc: New evidence from one of the world's oldest maps offers clues to a long-lost civilization of untold treasure, and this cutting-edge expedition might finally prove that this mysterious kingdom is the ancestral home of the ancient Egyptians.

programme.title: King Tut's Final Secrets
programme.desc: The most famous Egyptian king in history ruled for only 10 years before his mysterious death. Using 3-D CT-scan imaging, National Geographic reveals what King Tutankhamun looked like on the day he died and unveils new findings relating to his death.

programme.desc: The world's leading experts on ancient Egypt reveal the greatest treasures and discoveries of the great empire of the Nile.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Search for Nefertiti's Mummy
programme.desc: New technology might help experts track down Nefertiti's missing mummy, an investigation that could reveal new secrets about one of ancient Egypt's most powerful women.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Secrets of the Alien Relic
programme.desc: A strange, alien artifact discovered in the ruins of an ancient Greek shipwreck holds the secrets of a technology thousands of years ahead of its time. Now experts are using cutting-edge science to reveal what this mysterious device was used for.

programme.title: Dallas SWAT
programme.desc: Sr. Corporal Steve Claggett and other SWAT members practice their explosive breaching skills. Then, Steve rushes to the scene of an armed barricade where two suspects have allegedly robbed a convenience store.

programme.title: Dallas SWAT
programme.desc: When Dallas patrol officers respond to a disturbance call, they find an armed parole violator intent on not returning to jail. The suspect fires at police and barricades himself in a bathroom. A SWAT negotiator is called in to talk the man out safely.

programme.title: The Big House: Angola
programme.desc: Angola is a brutal maximum-security prison known as the 'Bloodiest Prison in America.' Most of the facility's 5,000 inmates will never see the outside world again.

programme.title: The Big House: Maze Prison
programme.desc: The Maze Prison held Catholic and Protestant prisoners, along with paramilitary groups.

programme.title: The Big House: Folsom
programme.desc: An inside-the-walls look at the violent history of Folsom Prison, which opened in 1880.

programme.title: The Big House: Montana State Prison
programme.desc: Today, the state prison in Deer Lodge, Montana operates as both a ranch and a modern high-security prison but its legacy is dark and its history is marked by violent uprisings.

programme.title: The Big House: Parchman
programme.desc: Originally a slave plantation ruled by the whip, today Parchman's most important crop is neither food nor cotton, but prisoners.

programme.title: American Justice: What Happened to Carrie Culberson?

programme.title: American Justice: A Model Murder

programme.title: Nightwatch: Life on the Line

programme.title: Nightwatch: We Give Thanks
programme.desc: Titus and Dan resuscitate an overdosing drug user just before all hope is lost; Brooke and Landon tend to a young girl with congenital heart issues; a team of fire fighters contain a fire before it can wreak havoc.

programme.title: Nightwatch: Officer Down
programme.desc: After a quiet beginning of the evening, multiple calls virtually explode across the radio at once, and the most alarming code heard is for 'Officer Shot.'

programme.title: Fugitive Chronicles: Darli
programme.desc: An incredible international manhunt ensues when a player in Miami's drug world goes on the lam.

programme.title: Fugitive Chronicles: Danny Ray Horning
programme.desc: Horning goes to the one place he thinks he'll never be found, the Grand Canyon. Living off the land, he evades capture in the longest and largest manhunt in Arizona state history.

programme.title: Female Forces: DUI's and Don'ts
programme.desc: A drunken male suspect gets a little rough; a public indecency suspect causes trouble.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Drowning in Tears
programme.desc: When Tim meets Maryann at a Catholic mixer, it's a match made in heaven. But while the future looks bright, a dark cloud gathers on the horizon the shadow of Tim's ex-wife. Despite the best intentions, everyone knows that raising a family can be murder.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Murder, Modesty, and the Pastor
programme.desc: Corinne isn't a demanding woman - she just wants what many lonely people want: a second chance at love. And when she meets Calvin Stoudt she finally gets it. But a too-close roommate and a monstrous past turn this second chance into a deadly battleground.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: The Bad Apple
programme.desc: Nicky and his wife Ellie appear to be living the perfect retirement until one of them is found dead in an apple orchard.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Hell on Earth
programme.desc: Luther is a minister's son who falls hard for a pastor's daughter, Anita. With love and faith, they make it work until the work runs out. And the crushing blow of failure turns heaven-on-earth into a bloody hell.

programme.title: Web of Lies: The Deadly Hoax
programme.desc: When a tech-savvy computer whiz fails to make the grade as a pro video gamer, he becomes obsessed with finding internet infamy. What starts as an online prank spirals into a new, deadly crime called 'swatting' that chills the nation.

programme.title: Twisted Love: Love is Relative
programme.desc: When a woman discovers her adult (and married) son engaging in an affair with his 14-year-old stepsister, it creates a family rift that will end in tragedy.

programme.title: Stranger Among Us: Flames of Fury
programme.desc: A tight-knit community of West Virginia firefighters is horrified when they discover a suspicious fire is actually hiding a triple murder.

programme.title: Betrayed: Suited for Murder
programme.desc: After two kids and two divorces, Charleston, West Virginia native Kathy Goble was making herself a priority for the first time in her life. However, her carefree ways soon catch up to her and she is betrayed in the most brutal way possible.

programme.title: Twisted Love: Love is Relative

programme.title: Blood Relatives: Sex, Lies and Videotape
programme.desc: A frantic 9-1-1 caller informs police he's found a family member dead. At first, it looks like a simple case of suicide. But a deeper dig reveals a secret world of sex tapes, broken promises and unbelievable murder motives.

programme.title: Blood Relatives: A Killing in Rotation
programme.desc: police are called to a horrific scene after a fire reveals charred fragments of a human corpse.

programme.title: Blood Relatives: Mommy Dearest
programme.desc: The suburbs of Detroit provide a comfortable backdrop for locals to build a life. One family though is quickly headed for disaster when affairs, lies, and explosive arguments lead someone to an early grave.

programme.title: Blood Relatives: Death is in the Heir
programme.desc: Living in Little Washington, North Carolina means you've made it. For one member of a local family though, nothing is ever enough. Old family money combined with a get-rich-quick attitude put deadly targets on everybody's backs.

programme.title: Blood Relatives: A Killing in Rotation
programme.desc: police are called to a horrific scene after a fire reveals charred fragments of a human corpse.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Cabin 28: Horror in the Woods
programme.desc: A mother and three teens are murdered in the remote town of Keddie, California. Despite a trail of suspects and illicit activity, no one was ever brought to justice. But recently discovered evidence may be the key to finally cracking case.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Mystery in the Swamp
programme.desc: The morning of his anniversary, Mike Williams goes duck hunting. When he fails to return home that afternoon, an all-out search commences. But it's only the beginning of a sordid mystery that will take close to 20 years to solve.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Shallow Grave
programme.desc: When a young family suddenly vanishes from their Southern California dream home, friends and family are left with dozens of unanswered questions. Authorities suspect they fled the country, until an unlikely source uncovers the truth.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: He'd Do It Again
programme.desc: When the well-liked South Bend native, Tim Moore, seemingly vanishes one cold November night, residents begin to realize they may not know the folks next door as well as they thought.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: The Devil Wears Sneakers
programme.desc: A tight-knit Illinois farming town is rocked when a family of five is found beaten to death in their home. When the bodies of the Gee family are discovered, the tiny town of Beason, IL finds itself in the midst of a gruesome murder mystery.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Mom Makes Four
programme.desc: When Carla Fuqua vanishes after a night out with friends, her family panics. She's a dedicated mother who would never leave her son behind. Even worse, Carla has become the fourth missing person in a town of less than 5,000.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Open Door Policy
programme.desc: The brutal murder of Mike and Terri Greene hits close to home in Grand Ledge, Michigan. The couple was beloved by everyone in the small town and Mike was a retired police officer. Evidence of a personal grudge, but could the motive so clear cut?

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Cold War, Hot War
programme.desc: A look at the crucial events of the 1960s: U.S. troops in Vietnam, the USSR's warheads in Cuba and the moon landing.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Revolution
programme.desc: A look at how Russia sealed themselves behind an Iron Curtain, a move that spawned the birth of revolutions across East Europe and beyond.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Paranoia
programme.desc: As the propaganda war and the arms race rage on, the 1950's becomes the decade of paranoia. The stalemate between democracy and communism reaches a fever pitch as the world descends further in chaos.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Rise of the Superpowers
programme.desc: For four decades ago, two global superpowers faced off, threatening to annihilate one another with the push of a button. It is an arms race, a propaganda battle and at times, a deadly game.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: Goering's Greed
programme.desc: Billions of dollars of art and treasure was stolen by the second most powerful figure in Nazi Germany. The team search for items stolen from Holland, including sunken treasure and lost masterpieces.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: Hitler's Obsession
programme.desc: Hitler's desire to acquire the largest art collection in the world led to the theft of numerous rare art treasures throughout Europe. The team delves into how these mass thefts were orchestrated. Also, an astounding discovery is made.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: Nazi Gold
programme.desc: Stolen gold was the fuel of the Nazi War industry. The team looks into the quantity looted and where it's believed to have ended up. The chilling story of a Canadian Commando and gold taken at Auschwitz is revealed.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: The Mystery of Rommel's Gold
programme.desc: In 1943, the Nazis looted $50 million in gold from the Jewish community in Djerba, Tunisia. The team tracks the loot to a dive site off Corsica, a pawn shop in Germany, and the family of an escaped Nazi in South America.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: Hitler's Obsession
